title: Integrationsutvecklare
description:
Landskrona är på frammarsch på många plan. Nya områden med havsnära boende växer fram och allt fler företag väljer att etablera sig just här. Läget mitt i Öresundsregionen med närhet till bad och stad, natur och kultur lockar allt fler till inflyttning, etablering och besök.
  
  

I Landskrona stad med drygt 3300 medarbetare arbetar vi efter vår värdegrund BRA, där B står för bemötande, R för resultat och A för ansvar. Vår värdegrund ska genomsyra all vår verksamhet och vi ska vara en arbetsplats där du känner arbetsglädje och stolthet. Här finns utrymme för dig med mod och handlingskraft och du får möjlighet att utvecklas.
  
  

Vill du vara med och påverka utvecklingen i en av Skånes mest spännande städer? Välkommen med din ansökan!
  
  

1 plats(er).
  
  

ARBETSUPPGIFTER
  
Har du ett stort intresse för teknik och gillar att se idéer bli verklighet? Hos Landskrona stad får du en central roll i att koppla samman stadens system, automatisera flöden och bidra till en smartare vardag för både medarbetare och invånare. Det här är en roll för dig som trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik och verksamhet och som vill se konkreta resultat av ditt arbete.
  
  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat vara att:**
  
  

* Utveckla, konfigurera och testa integrationer mellan verksamhetssystem
* Arbeta med REST- och SOAP-baserade API: er samt hantera dataformat som JSON och XML
* Delta i kravinsamling och lösningsdesign tillsammans med verksamheten
* Felsöka, övervaka och förbättra befintliga integrationer
* Dokumentera lösningar, flöden och tekniska specifikationer
* Bidra till utvecklingen av stadens plattformar för automation, RPA och e-tjänster
* Samverka med systemleverantörer, systemförvaltare och interna intressenter


Vårt erbjudande
  
  

Hos oss får du möjlighet att vara med och utveckla stadens digitala förmåga och skapa lösningar som används av tusentals medarbetare och invånare varje dag. Du blir en del av en organisation med höga ambitioner inom digitalisering där du får möjlighet att påverka både teknikval och arbetssätt.
  
  

KVALIFIKATIONER
  
Vi söker dig som arbetar strukturerat och har lätt för att analysera problem, hitta lösningar och driva ditt arbete framåt. Samtidigt är du kommunikativ och uppskattar samarbetet mellan teknik och verksamhet.
  
  

För att lyckas i rollen behöver du kunna arbeta självständigt, ta initiativ och ha förmåga att skapa förtroende hos både kollegor och externa leverantörer.
  
  

Krav
  
  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom systemutveckling, systemvetenskap, IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig
* Erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling
* Erfarenhet av REST- och SOAP-baserade API: er
* God kunskap om JSON och XML
* Erfarenhet av data- och meddelandetransformation
* Grundläggande förståelse för systemarkitektur och informationsflöden
* Erfarenhet av teknisk dokumentation
* God svenska i tal och skrift


Meriterande
  
  

* Erfarenhet av integrationsplattformar, exempelvis Lobster, Frends eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av PowerShell
* Erfarenhet av SQL
* Erfarenhet av RPA-plattformar
* Kunskap inom processmodellering (BPMN/BPMS)
* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av arbete med informations- eller integrationsarkitektur


I denna rekrytering ber vi dig att bifoga ditt CV samt besvara ett antal urvalsfrågor. I rekryteringsprocessen ingår även arbetsprov.
  
  

Syftet med urvalsfrågorna är att skapa en effektivare och mer rättvis rekryteringsprocess, där alla kandidater bedöms utifrån samma kompetensbaserade kriterier.
  
  

Välkommen med din ansökan!
  
  

**Löneform:** Månadslön.
  
**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning.
  
**Varaktighet:** Tillsvidare, tillträde: 2026-09-16 Eller enligt överenskommelse.
  
**Arbetstid:** Dagtid.
  
  

Om avdelningen
  
  

Avdelningen för Digitalisering och IT leder det digitala arbetet i Landskrona stad, både för förvaltningarna och de kommunala bolagen. Avdelningens politiska mål är att driva på digitaliseringen inom Landskrona stad. Avdelningens huvuduppgifter är att:
  
  

* Formulera Landskrona stads strategiska riktning när det gäller digitaliseringsarbetet och bygga en arkitektur för detta
* Fungera som samordnare och verksamhetsstöd i strategiska digitaliseringsoch IT-frågor
* Ansvara för utveckling, support och underhåll av Landskrona stads digitala -infrastruktur, -arbetsplats och - gemensamma tjänster
* Agera som projektkontor och projektleda större verksamhetsprojekt
* Samordna Landskrona stads initiativ inom ramen för digital transformation och innovation (Smart Samhälle)
* Samordna och leda IT-säkerhetsarbetet


**Arbetsgivarinformation:** https://www.landskrona.se/jobbailandskronastad
  
  

För att kvalitetssäkra rekryteringsprocessen i Landskrona stad använder vi rekryteringsverktyget Visma Recruit. Därför ber vi dig att skicka in din ansökan via Visma Recruit genom att klicka på ansökningslänken i annonsen. En ansökan till Landskrona stad är en allmän handling och dina personuppgifter hanteras enligt GDPR.
  
  

Då vi inför denna rekrytering redan tagit ställning till de rekryteringskanaler vi önskar använda undanber vi oss att bli kontaktade för ytterligare erbjudanden om kompetensförmedling samt annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp.
  
  

Om du som sökande har skyddade personuppgifter skickar du in ansökan till HR-avdelningen via post eller lämnar in den i receptionen, ställd till HR-enheten där du också anger vilket referensnummer annonsen har. I din ansökan behöver du ange hur du vill bli kontaktad av rekryterande chef. Din ansökan kommer sekretessmarkeras och bevaras i två år även om du inte blir anställd hos oss. Därefter gallras handlingarna. Du kan läsa mer om hur vi behandlar dina personuppgifter på https://www.landskrona.se/kommun-och-politik/sa-behandlar-landskrona-stad-personuppgifter/.

title: Erfaren Qlik Sense-utvecklare
description:
Om Connecting Stockholm
  
  

Som ansvariga för Stockholms tunnelbana driver vi en samhällsbärande verksamhet där säkerhet, tillgänglighet och punktlighet står i centrum. Vi kombinerar erfarenhet och nytänkande för att skapa en tunnelbana som är trygg idag och hållbar för framtiden.
  
  

Men vårt uppdrag handlar om mer än trafik – det handlar om människor, ansvar och tillit. Varje dag möter vi hundratusentals resenärer, och genom ett varmt, respektfullt och professionellt bemötande skapar vi en reseupplevelse där alla känner sig varmt välkomna och trygga. Hos oss är kulturen lika viktig som uppdraget. Vi tror på samarbetets kraft, på relationer som bygger förtroende och på ett ledarskap som präglas av professionalism, hjärta och engagemang.
  
  

Vi drivs av utveckling – både av vår verksamhet och våra medarbetare. Hos oss får du möjlighet att växa, påverka och vara med och forma framtidens kollektivtrafik – tillsammans med oss.
  
  

1 plats(er).
  
  

Om rollen
  
Vill du arbeta med data som verkligen gör skillnad? I den här rollen får du möjlighet att påverka hur beslut tas i en verksamhet med tydlig samhällsnytta, samtidigt som du utvecklas tekniskt tillsammans med ett engagerat och kunnigt team. Som senior Qlik Sense-utvecklare blir du en nyckelperson i att stärka vår analysförmåga. Du arbetar både operativt och strategiskt med BI, har stort inflytande över lösningar och arbetssätt samt bidrar till att utveckla vår tekniska riktning framåt. Här får du kombinera utveckling med rådgivning och förbättringsarbete – i en roll som går bortom att enbart bygga dashboards.” Du kommer att:
  
Utveckla och vidareutveckla Qlik Sense-applikationer som skapar verkligt värde
  
Arbeta nära verksamheten och omvandla behov till smarta lösningar
  
Vara med och forma vår BI-strategi och tekniska riktning
  
Säkerställa rätt åtkomst och robusta datamodeller
  
Dela kunskap och stötta kollegor i hur data kan användas bättre
  
Hålla dig uppdaterad på nya möjligheter inom Qlik och BI
  
  

Kvalifikationer
  
Erfarenhet av Qlik Sense (gärna flera år, men viktigast är vad du kan)
  
God förståelse för datamodellering och SQL
  
Vana att arbeta verksamhetsnära och omsätta behov till lösningar
  
Ett intresse för att utveckla både teknik och arbetssätt
  
Du är en nyfiken och lösningsorienterad utvecklare som gillar att samarbeta och se helheten.
  
Erfarenhet av Qlik Cloud eller NPrinting
  
  

Meriterande kvalifikationer
  
Intresse för datasäkerhet och governance
  
Jobbat med moderna dataplattformar (t.ex. Azure, Fabric eller Snowflake
  
  

Övrigt
  
* Anställningsform: Tillsvidare.
* Omfattning: Heltid.
* Startdatum: Enligt överenskommelse.
* Placering: Stockholm.
* Anställningen omfattas av kollektivavtal och erbjuder bland annat SL-kort, friskvårdsbidrag, lunchförmån och rabatterade försäkringar.


Om rekryteringsprocessen
  
Vi tillämpar kompetensbaserad rekrytering och strävar efter en rättvis och inkluderande process. Som en del av urvalet kan urvalsfrågor och tester användas för att säkerställa en objektiv bedömning. Referenstagning, alkohol- och drogtest samt eventuell bakgrundskontroll kan genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas.
  
Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via e-post. Vid frågor kontakta rekryteringen via rekrytering@connectingstockholm.se.
  
**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning.

title: FULLSTACK DEVELOPER
description:
**City:** Solna
  
Description
  
  

Digital Customer Solutions at SAS Digital & IT is looking for a Full Stack Developer.
  
Our teams build digital services to help customers find, buy and change SAS services and products, and enable smooth travel. To continue our transformation journey we are looking for full-stack developers to bring further energy, competence and skills to our teams.
  
  

**Challenges you will work on:**  

**In this role your main responsibilities will be to:**  

* Understand needs from business and translate then into working software.
* Secure application compliance with regulation (GDPR, Accessibility) and SAS IT security.
* Understand when and how to make performance optimizations and trade-offs.
* Design architecture and solutions based on MVP model that can scale to enterprise solutions.
* Work in close collaboration with Digital Project Owner to secure delivery according to the business backlog.
* Define processes with QA lead to secure high-quality and high-performing digital product.
* Coach, code review and pair programming with junior developers.
* Proactively suggest digital solutions that can help the organization meet its goals.


The Team
  
  

You will be part of Digital Customer Solutions within SAS Digital & IT. Our teams build customer-facing digital services that support the entire travel journey, from finding and purchasing products and services to managing and enhancing the customer experience before, during, and after travel.
  
  

To be successful we believe you have
  
  

Main tech skills and competence
  
* Experience with JavaScript libraries and frameworks.
* Proficiency with Node.js and Typescript.
* Hands-on experience in React.js web applications.
* Experience using build tools (Docker).
* Experience designing and integrating RESTful and GraphQL APIs.
* Experiences in Java 11+ and Spring Boot Technologies within microservice architectures.
* Familiarity with database technology such as MySQL, Postgres, Cosmos DB and MongoDB.
* Familiarity with cross-platform front-end mobile app framework (i.e. Flutter).
* Familiarity with micro frontend architectures.


Experiences with tools but not limited to
  
* Git
* Azure Cloud Platform
* Github
* Kubernetes
* Terraform


We believe you are
  
* Eager to put your creativity and sense of innovation to work in order to further develop SAS.
* A team player who enjoys being a part of a high performing multi skilled customer centric team producing high quality enterprise solutions based on RESTful APIs and modern front-end web and mobile app applications.


Why SAS?
  
  

At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
  
* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


Our Culture at SAS
  
  

At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
  
Come and fly with us!
  
  

Additional information
  
  

* Deadline for application: 05/07/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process, as this role is security classified. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.


**.buttontext21bb7d46ac375290 a{ border:** 1px solid transparent; } .buttontext21bb7d46ac375290 a: focus{ border: 1px dashed #0159ce !important; outline: none !important; }
  
  

SAS, Scandinavia's leading airline since 1946, operates from its principal hub at Copenhagen Airport (CPH), complemented by hubs in Oslo (OSL) and Stockholm (ARN). Our mission is to connect Scandinavia with the world and the world with Scandinavia. Each year, SAS serves more than 25 million passengers and transports 55 tons of cargo to 135 destinations across Europe, the USA, and Asia. With a passionate workforce of over 10,000 colleagues, we collaborate with partners and customers to drive transformative changes in aviation. We are committed to achieving net-zero emissions by 2050, embodying the visionary spirit of our founders: “To move from the old to what is about to come, is the only tradition worth keeping”. Innovation and societal progress are at the heart of everything we do. For

title: Product Developer Knitwear - H&M Womenswear
description:
**Job Description** *Are you passionate about fashion, driven by results and excited about turning creative ideas into commercial success?*

*We are looking for a Product Developer with a strategic mindset, a strong passion for knitwear garments and a collaborative spirit to join our Womenswear team at H&M.*

*This position is based at our HQ in Stockholm, Sweden.*  



**WHAT YOU’LL DO**  

As a Product Developer within knitwear you will play a key role in shaping the H&M Womenswear assortment. You will set and drive both short and long‑term plans for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment direction.


With a strong commercial mindset, deep product knowledge within knitwear and the ability to translate trends into relevant opportunities, you will identify seasonal keys and act fast on what’s emerging. You will continuously refine our product and component work to build a strong, competitive and customer‑centred knitwear offer.


You’ll take ideas from concept to final product, driving development forward and ensuring smooth cross‑functional collaboration in a fast‑moving environment. You will work closely with a product manager, planner, designer and pattern maker, and partner with our production team to bring each piece to life with the right quality, fit and feel.


Your passion for knitwear products and your ability to make things happen will be essential in creating high‑quality, on‑trend trousers that resonate with our customers.

 **WHO YOU ARE**  

Qualifications:

* Five or more years of experience in a similar role as Product Developer or Buyer
* Several years of experience working with knitwear garments
* Education in textiles, buying or product development
* A proven track record of creating products for the womenswear customer with excellent fashion sensibility
* Strong fashion intelligence and a keen eye for current trends
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Driven, structured and proactive in taking initiatives
* Strong salesmanship with a results‑oriented mindset
* Excellent communication skills
* A strong team player with a flexible, solution‑driven approach
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements and efficient ways of working

 **WHO WE ARE**  

H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.


We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.

 **JOIN US**  

Additional information:  

This is position has it's placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.) If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.


Benefits:  

At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.


Inclusion & Diversity:  

H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.


We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.

**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Game developer Unity
description:
### **ABOUT THE JOB**


Are you passionate about building stable, high-quality live games enjoyed by millions of players worldwide? We are looking for a Senior Game Developer to join an experienced game development team working on one of the world's most successful mobile games.


In this role, you will play a key part in ensuring the technical health, stability, and performance of a live game. You will take ownership of complex technical challenges, contribute to the game's architecture, and collaborate closely with engineers, producers, and release management to deliver high-quality releases.


This is an opportunity to have a real impact on a long-running, globally recognized title while working alongside a highly skilled engineering team.

### **ABOUT THE COMPANY**


Our client is an internationally recognized game development studio and part of a global entertainment group. The company develops and operates world-class mobile games played by millions of users across the globe. Innovation, collaboration, and technical excellence are at the heart of everything they do, offering employees the opportunity to work on large-scale products in a creative and supportive environment.

### **JOB DUTIES**


As a Senior Game Developer, you will:

* Take end-to-end ownership of complex technical issues and drive sustainable solutions.
* Design, develop, and extend existing game systems, frameworks, and engineering tools.
* Contribute to the technical architecture by improving existing systems and implementing new solutions.
* Write clean, maintainable, and high-quality C# code following software engineering best practices.
* Debug, profile, and optimize performance in a live production environment.
* Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver stable and high-quality game releases.
* Mentor fellow engineers and contribute to technical discussions and knowledge sharing.
* Drive continuous improvements to development processes and code quality.

### **EXPERIENCE AND QUALITIES**


We are looking for someone who has:

* 7+ years of professional software development experience.
* At least 5 years of hands-on experience with Unity and C#.
* Strong experience developing and maintaining live mobile games.
* Proven expertise in debugging, profiling, and performance optimization.
* Solid understanding of software architecture, object-oriented programming, and design patterns.
* Experience working with large and complex codebases.
* A proactive mindset with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.
* A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is considered an advantage.

### **OTHER**

**Location:** Stockholm, Sweden

**Employment type:** Full-time

**Start date:** As agreed


Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis, so we encourage interested candidates to apply as soon as possible.


For more info, contact tomas.ryden@d-source.se

### **ABOUT D-SOURCE**

*Your source to IT*  

D-Source is a modern consulting company with a breadth of expertise between helpdesk, infrastructure and Tech. We have extensive experience in understanding customers' IT needs! Do not hesitate to contact us if you are interested in finding out more.


What can we do for you and what can we do together?

### **NO JOB FOR YOU?**

Don't worry! You can always register without any conditions on the D-Source job page by Connecting with us. Then you will end up in our candidate database and get an overview of our upcoming current positions.

title: Backendutvecklare Python
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Erfarenhet av Python

  

**Meriterande**  

* Java
* Spring
* Django

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 30-06-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.

title: .NET Utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 6–8 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling
* Mycket god erfarenhet av .NET / C#
* Stark backendkompetens
* Erfarenhet av API-utveckling, exempelvis REST
* Erfarenhet av systemintegrationer
* Erfarenhet av databaser, exempelvis SQL Server

**Meriterande**  

* Erfarenhet av fullstackutveckling, exempelvis React eller Angular
* Azure eller annan molnplattform
* Microservices
* CI/CD och DevOps
* Docker, Kubernetes eller containerbaserade miljöer

* Erfarenhet av större förändrings-, migrerings- eller integrationsprojekt

description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**

* NodeJS
* VueJS

* DevOps platform (Azure, AWS, Google cloud or similar)
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)

**Application deadline:** 30-06-2026 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.

title: Erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare .NET C# till UMS Skeldar i Linköping
description:
###### **UMS Skeldar, ett mångfacetterat företag, med förmågor inom forskning, utveckling, design, tillverkning, testning, utbildning, underhåll och mycket mer. Vi utvecklar en av världens mest avancerade Unmanned Aerial Vehicle. Bli en del av vårt växande team!**

 *Key words: Software Engineering, .NET, C#, WPF, Embedded Systems, System Development*

###### **Nu söker vi en Senior Software Design Engineer med stark kompetens inom .NET och C#.**

### **Rollen som Senior Mjukvaruutvecklare C# hos oss:**


Du blir en del av teamet System & Software, som består av cirka 40 medarbetare i roller som systemingenjörer, mjukvaruutvecklare, HMI-designers och testare. Teamet arbetar tvärfunktionellt med helhetssystemet: helikopterplattformen, markstationen, datalänkar och simulatorn.
  

  

I rollen som mjukvaruutvecklare hos oss kommer du att:

* utveckla och vidareutveckla mjukvara i hela eller delar av systemet
* arbeta främst med markstationen, utvecklad i .NET C# och WPF
* designa och implementera nya funktioner i nära samarbete med system- och testteam
* utveckla och förbättra automatiserade testfall för att säkerställa kvalitet
* underhålla och förbättra befintlig kodbas genom buggrättning och vidareutveckling
* bidra till tekniska designbeslut och arkitekturella diskussioner
* lära upp mer juniora utvecklare

**Låter tjänsten intressant? Tveka inte att söka redan idag!**  



### **Är du den vi söker?**


Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och söker dig som trivs är självgående och ansvarstagande för dina uppgifter och driver arbetet framåt på ett strukturerat sätt. Samtidigt har du en stark samarbetsförmåga och trivs med att arbeta nära andra utvecklare, systemingenjörer och testare i en komplex systemmiljö.


För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har högskole- eller universitetsutbildning inom mjukvaruutveckling, datateknik eller motsvarande. Flerårig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling i .NET och C# och god förståelse för mjukvarudesign och systemutveckling i komplexa system. Erfarenhet av WPF är meriterande liksom erfarenhet av testautomation och/eller CI/CD. Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.

### **Vi erbjuder:**

* en möjlighet att vara en del av ett dynamiskt företag som ständigt utvecklas, där din påverkan spelar en viktig roll
* en högteknologisk produkt som just nu ligger i framkant på marknaden
* en familjär arbetskultur som karaktäriseras av samarbete och högt engagemang
* aktiviteter som främjar både social gemenskap och hälsa, genom vår Festkommitté, Hälsokommitté, Brädspelskommitté och ett Kvinnligt Nätverk.

### **Ytterligare information:**

* Arbetsplats: Linköping.
* Tjänstgöringsgrad: Heltid.
* Start: Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid.


För en anställning hos oss på UMS Skeldar krävs att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. Roller där vi har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.

**Vi behandlar ansökningar löpande. Urval och återkoppling sker mest troligt i slutet av augusti p.g.a semestertider.** **Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**

title: Systemutvecklare .NET
description:
*Vill du utveckla framtidens digitala kundmöte och skapa lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för rådgivare och kunder inom pension, sparande och försäkring? Som systemutvecklare .NET / Azure får du arbeta med modern teknik i ett engagerat team – och vara med på resan mot nästa generations digitala tjänster.*



**Om jobbet**  

Som systemutvecklare .NET / Azure arbetar du med utveckling, modernisering och vidareutveckling av våra digitala lösningar i en Azure-baserad miljö. Du deltar i hela utvecklingskedjan – från idé och design till produktion och vidareutveckling – där du har möjlighet att påverka både tekniska vägval och arbetssätt. Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team där utvecklare, Business Analysts, Scrum Master och Product Owner arbetar tillsammans för en kvalitativ leverans.



Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:


* Utveckla och förbättra lösningar i .NET / .NET Core (C#)
* Bygga och vidareutveckla API:er och integrationer
* Arbeta med Azure-tjänster såsom Functions, App Services, Container Apps och API Management
* Utveckla CI/CD-flöden och automatiserade leveranser i Azure DevOps
* Arbeta med Infrastructure as Code (Bicep)
* Delta i arkitektur- och designbeslut
* Bidra till att utveckla framtidens digitala kund- och rådgivningsupplevelser


**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

Personalvillkor på bolån och blancolån


Rabatt på sak-, person- och djurförsäkring


Friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimma


Gym & gruppträning på kontoret


Lunchförmån


Fyra extra lediga dagar/år utöver semesterdagarna


Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:


* Flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling i .NET / .NET Core
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure och integrationer
* Vana av API-utveckling och att arbeta med CI/CD-flöden
* Intresse för kvalitet, säkerhet och hållbara lösningar
* Förmåga att samarbeta nära både tekniska och verksamhetsnära roller



Meriterande är även om du har:


* Erfarenhet av Azure Functions, Container Apps och andra Azure-tjänster
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (exempelvis Bicep)
* Erfarenhet av containerteknik (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Erfarenhet av frontendutveckling (JavaScript, Vue, React, Angular)
* Erfarenhet av DevSecOps
* Erfarenhet av AI-tjänster inom Azure



Som person är du nyfiken, prestigelös och gillar att lösa problem tillsammans med andra. Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, delar gärna med dig av kunskap och trivs i en miljö där samarbete, lärande och ständig förbättring är en naturlig del av vardagen.



**Kontaktuppgifter:**  

Rekryterande chef: blerta.capri@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Forena: susanne.hirsch2@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: bitte.franzen-molander@lansforsakringar.se


*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*


  
Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.


Fondliv är Länsförsäkringsgruppens fondförsäkringsbolag och en ledande aktör inom pensionssparande, särskilt inom tjänstepension. Vår verksamhet präglas av ett starkt kundfokus och ett målmedvetet arbete för att leverera trygga och kvalitativa sparlösningar. Hos oss är du med och bidrar till att människor får det pensionsliv de önskar – ett arbete som verkligen gör skillnad.



Digital Utveckling inom Fondliv är en gruppering som tror på digitalisering genom utveckling och att det är nödvändigt för att förenkla och förbättra arbetsprocesser. Men det är också en möjlighet att skapa skräddarsydda och sömlösa kundupplevelser genom digitala kanaler vilket förbättrar kundnöjdhet och lojalitet. Vi vill skapa nya möjligheter för innovation, affärsutveckling och anpassningsförmåga. Vi vill kunna leverera bättre produkter, erbjudanden, tjänster och kundupplevelser jämfört med våra konkurrenter!



Vill du vara med och forma framtidens pensionslösningar? Hos Fondliv får du chansen att växa, utvecklas och göra skillnad – varje dag.


  
Blerta Capri | Kontaktperson

title: Senior/Lead .Net utvecklare till Region- IT
description:
Vill du vara med och utveckla digitala lösningar som gör verklig nytta i samhället?  

Region Värmland söker en senior/lead .NET-utvecklare som vill ta en central roll i att vidareutveckla våra egenutvecklade system och stärka vår långsiktiga leveransförmåga inom enheten IT Utveckling.

### **Din arbetsplats**


Hos oss arbetar du verksamhetsnära i en miljö där din kompetens bidrar till att förbättra och effektivisera viktiga samhällsfunktioner. Rollen är strategiskt viktig för att säkerställa balansen mellan stabil förvaltning och fortsatt utveckling.


Vi erbjuder

* Ett meningsfullt arbete där du bidrar till samhällsnytta inom Region Värmland
* En central och viktig roll med stort inflytande över teknikval och arbetssätto
* Möjlighet att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt
* Ett agilt arbetssätt med nära samarbete mellan IT och verksamhet
* En arbetsmiljö där kunskapsdelning, samarbete och utveckling står i fokus
* Möjlighet att påverka och förbättra struktur, arbetssätt och tekniska lösningar

### **Dina arbetsuppgifter**


I rollen som senior/lead .Net utvecklare ingår du i ett agilt team där ni tillsammans ansvarar för förvaltning och vidareutveckling av ett flertal egenutvecklade applikationer i en Microsoftbaserad miljö.


Du har ansvar för att säkerställa stabil drift, god kodkvalitet och en långsiktigt hållbar teknisk utveckling.


Arbetet innebär att du:

* Driver utvecklingen framåt och bidrar till tekniska vägval
* Säkerställer struktur och kvalitet i förvaltning och livscykelhantering
* Teamet arbetar nära verksamheten för att omsätta behov till lösningar
* Tar ett naturligt tekniskt ledarskap och delar med dig av din kunskap

### **Dina kunskaper och kompetenser**


Vi söker dig som

* har en akademisk utbildning inom IT, eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig. Vi lägger stor vikt vid relevant yrkeserfarenhet.
* har flerårig erfarenhet som .NET-utvecklare och är trygg i att arbeta i en Microsoftbaserad miljö.
* har mycket goda kunskaper inom .NET (C#)
* har goda kunskaper inom SQL Server.


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av Azure DevOps, Power Platform (Power Apps och Power Automate) samt PowerShell.


För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är strukturerad och analytisk, och trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra i ett team. Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, driver uppgifter framåt och har förmåga att prioritera mellan förvaltning och utveckling i en komplex miljö.


Du är trygg som person, arbetar självständigt och har en god självinsikt. Samtidigt är du en lagspelare som bidrar till ett gott samarbete och delar med dig av din kunskap. Vidare tar du initiativ, sätter igång aktiviteter och ser till att de slutförs. Du har en förmåga att skapa engagemang och delaktighet i teamet och i samarbetet med verksamheten.


Om Region Värmland Vi är till för att alla som bor här ska må bra och för att vår region ska vara attraktiv och konkurrenskraftig. Vi gör skillnad inom hälso- och sjukvård, tandvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och kultur och bildning. Vi möter människor i livets största stunder och i alla de där vardagsögonblicken där emellan. Vår vision är livskvalitet i världsklass. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss och våra förmåner och följ oss på sociala medier. Vill du också jobba för alla i Värmland? Välkommen med din ansökan. Övrigt Från 7 juni 2026 gäller EU:s lönetransparensdirektiv - för ökad öppenhet och rättvisa löner. Information om kollektivavtal finns på SKR:s webbplats, Kollektivavtal -SKR I samband med eventuell anställning kan vi komma att be dig som sökande att lämna ett utdrag ur polisens belastningsregister. Inför anställning inom psykiatrisk vård, vård av funktionshindrade, vård av barn eller ungdomar gör arbetsgivaren en kontroll i polisens misstanke och belastningsregister. Ett utslag i detta register kan komma att påverka din möjlighet till anställning. Har du skyddad identitet och vill göra en ansökan ber vi dig att kontakta Kompetensförsörjningsenhet HR via Regionens växel 010-831 50 00. Då får du hjälp att lämna in din ansökan utan att den hanteras i Varbi. Tänk på att endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen. Inför rekryteringsarbetet har Region Värmland tagit ställning till rekryteringskanaler och marknadsföring. Vi undanber oss därför alla erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.

title: Software Engineer - Audio
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You're the kind of engineer who gets curious when things don't behave as expected. When audio drops, latency spikes, devices behave inconsistently, or streams become unreliable, you want to understand why.
   

  

 You've spent time building systems where audio and real-time media matter. Maybe you've worked on streaming platforms, communication products, podcasting infrastructure, video conferencing, live broadcasting, or other media-heavy applications. You've seen the challenges that come with real-time systems and know that delivering a seamless experience requires careful engineering across the entire stack.
   

  

 At Tandem Health, you'll help build and scale the audio infrastructure powering millions of healthcare conversations. From device capture and streaming to transcription and AI-powered documentation, you'll work on systems that need to be reliable, low-latency, and production-ready at scale.
   

  

 This is a highly impactful role where you'll work closely with product, AI, and platform teams to ensure that every conversation reaches our systems with the quality and reliability needed to support clinicians across Europe.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Build and improve the systems that power real-time audio streaming throughout our platform.
* Work across the full media pipeline, including device capture, buffering, transport, streaming, transcription, monitoring, and quality assurance.
* Design and operate reliable, scalable infrastructure capable of handling large volumes of real-time audio data.
* Investigate and solve challenging production issues related to latency, connectivity, audio quality, and device compatibility.
* Collaborate with engineers across frontend, backend, infrastructure, and AI teams to build seamless end-to-end experiences.
* Improve observability, testing, and tooling to ensure our media systems remain stable as we continue to scale.
* Help shape technical direction and engineering best practices for real-time media systems at Tandem.


**What You Bring**
* Experience building and operating production systems involving audio, video, streaming, or other real-time data.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals and experience building reliable backend systems.
* Familiarity with technologies and protocols commonly used in real-time media systems such as WebRTC, RTP, RTCP, WebSockets, streaming infrastructure, or similar technologies.
* Experience troubleshooting performance, latency, reliability, and scalability issues in production environments.
* A systems-oriented mindset and a strong desire to understand how things work beneath the surface.
* Ability to work across multiple layers of the stack and collaborate effectively with engineers from different disciplines.
* Strong communication skills and a pragmatic approach to solving complex technical problems.


**Bonus Points**
* Experience working with large-scale audio processing pipelines.
* Experience with speech-to-text, transcription, or conversational AI systems.
* Experience building products where audio or video is a core part of the user experience.
* Experience with frontend development in React and TypeScript.
* Experience with C# and Windows-based development.
* Experience working in healthcare, regulated environments, or other reliability-critical domains.


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

 How to Apply
   

  

 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: FULLSTACK DEVELOPER
description:
**Description**
 Digital Customer Solutions at SAS Digital & IT is looking for a Full Stack Developer.
   

  

 Our teams build digital services to help customers find, buy and change SAS services and products, and enable smooth travel. To continue our transformation journey we are looking for full-stack developers to bring further energy, competence and skills to our teams.
   

  

**Challenges You Will Work On**
 In this role your main responsibilities will be to:
   

  

* Understand needs from business and translate then into working software.
* Secure application compliance with regulation (GDPR, Accessibility) and SAS IT security.
* Understand when and how to make performance optimizations and trade-offs.
* Design architecture and solutions based on MVP model that can scale to enterprise solutions.
* Work in close collaboration with Digital Project Owner to secure delivery according to the business backlog.
* Define processes with QA lead to secure high-quality and high-performing digital product.
* Coach, code review and pair programming with junior developers.
* Proactively suggest digital solutions that can help the organization meet its goals.


 The Team
   

  

 You will be part of Digital Customer Solutions within SAS Digital & IT. Our teams build customer-facing digital services that support the entire travel journey, from finding and purchasing products and services to managing and enhancing the customer experience before, during, and after travel.
   

  

 To be successful we believe you have
   

  

**Main Tech Skills And Competence**
* Experience with JavaScript libraries and frameworks.
* Proficiency with Node.js and Typescript.
* Hands-on experience in React.js web applications.
* Experience using build tools (Docker).
* Experience designing and integrating RESTful and GraphQL APIs.
* Experiences in Java 11+ and Spring Boot Technologies within microservice architectures.
* Familiarity with database technology such as MySQL, Postgres, Cosmos DB and MongoDB.
* Familiarity with cross-platform front-end mobile app framework (i.e. Flutter).
* Familiarity with micro frontend architectures.


**Experiences With Tools But Not Limited To**
* Git
* Azure Cloud Platform
* Github
* Kubernetes
* Terraform


**We believe you are**
* Eager to put your creativity and sense of innovation to work in order to further develop SAS.
* A team player who enjoys being a part of a high performing multi skilled customer centric team producing high quality enterprise solutions based on RESTful APIs and modern front-end web and mobile app applications.


 Why SAS?
   

  

**Benefits**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


 Our Culture at SAS
   

  

 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

 Come and fly with us!
   

  

 Additional information
   

  

* Deadline for application: 05/07/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process, as this role is security classified. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.

title: Full Stack developer to Asset Management Tech
description:
Are you passionate about new technology and making a difference? Join our digital transformation!
   

  

 SEB Asset Management offers a full range of asset management and advisory services and is a leading Nordic player in this area. We also handle fund management and discretionary mandates for the whole of SEB. We cater to both private customers and institutional investors and offer everything from broad solutions to niche funds in asset classes such as equities, fixed income, hedge funds, commodities and private equity. We have high ambitions with our sustainability work and are constantly working to improve and develop our work. Our goal is for all our total assets under management to be invested carbon neutral by 2040.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a full stack developer to join the Reporting & Analytics team within Asset Management Tech. The team is dedicated to data products for funds, portfolios and financial instruments. This includes developing solutions for regulatory reporting, portfolio performance reporting or client data, among other areas. You will play a key role in designing and developing scalable solutions that support our core business.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have
   

  

 We are looking for a positive and proactive team player who enjoys collaborating, sharing knowledge and learning from others. You are a natural problem solver with a strong sense of ownership. You hold an academic degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related field and have solid experience in software development.
   

  

* Strong background in C# .NET, MS SQL and React.
* Experience working with public cloud solutions, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Familiarity with GitHub and CI/CD workflows
* Experience in data visualization tools such as Tableau, SSRS or Power Bi or similar


 In our team, a strong business understanding is important. You are familiar with how funds and portfolios are constructed and managed, and understand the characteristics and use of different financial instruments (e.g. equities, fixed income, derivatives). This enables you to translate business needs into robust technical solutions supporting reporting, risk measurements and analytics.
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

 We offer many experiences and benefits to our employees, and there is nuance to every individual’s career experience, but the elements that define the core of our offering are:
   

  

* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Work-life balance.
* International opportunities and working environment.
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits.
* Innovative company in forefront of technology.


 Ready to take the next step on your career journey?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **August 16th** 
 . Please note that, due to the holiday period, we will begin the screening process after the summer holidays, sometime during
 **week 34** 
 . If you have questions about the position, please contact Sara Hising, sara.hising@seb.se but we will not process applications via email.

title: Senior Frontend Developer - Angular
description:
**Senior Frontend Developer** 




 📍 Stockholm, Sweden (On-site with some flexibility)
 


* Requires the candidate to live/relocate to Stockholm
* Open to EU Citizens



  





 A growing technology company delivering innovative software solutions to international B2B clients is looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to join its product development team in Solna, Sweden.
 



  





 This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced frontend engineer who enjoys building modern web applications, driving technical decisions, and contributing to high-quality products in a collaborative and fast-paced environment. You will play a key role in shaping frontend architecture, developing new features, and mentoring other team members while working with modern technologies and development practices.
 



  





**What You'll Be Doing** 




 As a Senior Frontend Developer, you will:
 


* Architect, design, and develop new frontend features and components
* Build modular, scalable, and reusable code libraries
* Help define and maintain frontend development standards and best practices
* Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver high-quality solutions
* Integrate frontend applications with backend services and APIs
* Monitor and optimise application performance to ensure excellent user experiences
* Evaluate and introduce new tools, technologies, and frameworks where appropriate
* Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
* Participate actively in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives
* Contribute to technical discussions and solution design initiatives



  





**What We're Looking For** 




 The ideal candidate will have:
 


* 3+ years of experience developing modern frontend web applications
* Strong expertise in JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks, particularly Angular
* Experience integrating applications with RESTful APIs
* Good understanding of web performance optimisation, SEO principles, and web analytics
* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
* Excellent communication and collaboration abilities
* Strong organisational and time-management skills
* Ability to work independently and take ownership of technical initiatives
* Fluent English, both written and spoken



  





**What's On Offer** 



* 50,000 - 60,000 SEK gross monthly + bonus and benefits package
* Opportunity to work on innovative products used by international clients
* Modern and collaborative working environment
* Strong focus on professional development and career growth
* Multicultural team with colleagues from diverse backgrounds
* Generous vacation and parental leave benefits
* Comprehensive insurance and pension package
* Regular team-building activities, company events, and social initiatives
* Weekly team breakfasts and a supportive company culture



  





 If you're passionate about frontend development, enjoy working with modern technologies, and want to be part of a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, we'd love to hear from you.
 



  





 For more information, contact Kristoffer Parkhagen confidentially at +356 9999 8469 or send your CV to kristoffer.parkhagen@boston-link.com.

title: Backend Developer - Java/Kotlin
description:

* Ability to work efficiently in a high-paced, evolving project environment.

**Meritorious**
* Knowledge of contemporary programming practices.

 30-06-2026

 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?

title: Software Engineer - Workbench
description:
**About Applied Intuition**
 Applied Intuition, Inc. is powering the future of physical AI. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion, the Silicon Valley company is creating the digital infrastructure needed to bring intelligence to every moving machine on the planet. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining and agriculture industries in three core areas: tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy. Eighteen of the top 20 global automakers, as well as the United States military and its allies, trust the company’s solutions to deliver physical intelligence. Applied Intuition is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, with offices in Washington, D.C.; San Diego; Ft. Walton Beach, Florida; Ann Arbor, Michigan; London; Stuttgart; Munich; Stockholm; Bangalore; Seoul; and Tokyo. Learn more at applied.co.
   

  

*We are an in-office company, and our expectation is that employees primarily work from their Applied Intuition office 5 days a week. However, we also recognize the importance of flexibility and trust our employees to manage their schedules responsibly. This may include occasional remote work, starting the day with morning meetings from home before heading to the office, or leaving earlier when needed to accommodate family commitments.*
 Meet our software engineers!
   

  

 Meet some of our software engineers who are shaping the future of autonomy and delivering world-class solutions helping customers shorten time to market. Hear about what brought them to Applied Intuition, what’s kept them interested, and their advice to potential candidates.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will streamline developer workflows and deployment infrastructure for complex automotive systems, identifying friction to improve velocity and reliability. By building robust
 **HIL/SIL** 
 validation pipelines and leveraging cloud-based
 **CI/CD** 
 , you will evolve the tooling and automation platforms necessary to scale modern embedded software development across the entire lifecycle.
   

  

**At Applied Intuition, You Will**
* Design, build, and improve the tools, libraries, and frameworks for our engineering team
* Develop and evolve CI/CD pipelines for embedded and automotive software, including SIL and HIL test environments
* Build and test scalable tools for deploying to various automotive and cloud platforms
* Optimize our compile/build times using tools like Bazel, CMake, Docker
* Improve software deployment and data collection frameworks
* Identify and solve bottlenecks within our software stack


**We're Looking For Someone Who Has**
* 5+ years of relevant experience
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent
* Some experience using Python, Go, Java, or Kotlin
* Experience with CI, build, and deployment technologies like Bazel, Buildkite, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins, and comfortability with scripting for automation
* Exposure to embedded, automotive, SIL/HIL, or hardware-adjacent environments is highly desirable
* Experience with Linux and/or ARM systems


**Nice To Have**
* Experience using C and C++
* Experience working in automotive or related industries
* Experience with deploying software on either public clouds (e.g., AWS) or on-premise clusters


**Benefits and** 
**perks**
* Lunch and dinner allowance
* Fitness (600 USD) and learning stipends (1,000 USD) annually
* Stock options


 Compensation at Applied Intuition for eligible roles includes base salary, equity, and benefits. Base salary is a single component of the total compensation package, which may also include equity in the form of options and/or restricted stock units, comprehensive health, dental, vision, life and disability insurance coverage, learning and wellness stipends, and paid time off. Note that benefits are subject to change and may vary based on jurisdiction of employment.
   

  

 Applied Intuition pay ranges reflect the minimum and maximum intended target base salary for new hire salaries for the position. The actual base salary offered to a successful candidate will additionally be influenced by a variety of factors including experience, credentials & certifications, educational attainment, skill level requirements, interview performance, and the level and scope of the position.
   

  

 Please reference the job posting’s subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the location listed is: 511.200 - 1.098.200 SEK yearly.
   

  

*Don’t meet every single requirement? If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.*
*Applied Intuition is an equal opportunity employer and federal contractor or subcontractor. Consequently, the parties agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of 41 CFR 60-1.4(a), 41 CFR 60-300.5(a) and 41 CFR 60-741.5(a) and that these laws are incorporated herein by reference. These regulations prohibit discrimination against qualified individuals based on their status as protected veterans or individuals with disabilities, and prohibit discrimination against all individuals based on their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or national origin. These regulations require that covered prime contractors and subcontractors take affirmative action to employ and advance in employment individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status or disability. The parties also agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of Executive Order 13496 (29 CFR Part 471, Appendix A to Subpart A), relating to the notice of employee rights under federal labor laws.*

title: Product Developer Knitwear - H&M Womenswear
description:
**Job Description**

*Are you passionate about fashion, driven by results and excited about turning creative ideas into commercial success?*




*We are looking for a Product Developer with a strategic mindset, a strong passion for knitwear garments and a collaborative spirit to join our Womenswear team at H&M.*




*This position is based at our HQ in Stockholm, Sweden.*
  

  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
**​**
  

 As a Product Developer within knitwear you will play a key role in shaping the H&M Womenswear assortment. You will set and drive both short and long‑term plans for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment direction.
   

  





 With a strong commercial mindset, deep product knowledge within knitwear and the ability to translate trends into relevant opportunities, you will identify seasonal keys and act fast on what’s emerging. You will continuously refine our product and component work to build a strong, competitive and customer‑centred knitwear offer.
   

  





 You’ll take ideas from concept to final product, driving development forward and ensuring smooth cross‑functional collaboration in a fast‑moving environment. You will work closely with a product manager, planner, designer and pattern maker, and partner with our production team to bring each piece to life with the right quality, fit and feel.
   

  





 Your passion for knitwear products and your ability to make things happen will be essential in creating high‑quality, on‑trend trousers that resonate with our customers.
   

  





  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**
  

 Qualifications:
   

  




* Five or more years of experience in a similar role as Product Developer or Buyer
* Several years of experience working with knitwear garments
* Education in textiles, buying or product development
* A proven track record of creating products for the womenswear customer with excellent fashion sensibility
* Strong fashion intelligence and a keen eye for current trends
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Driven, structured and proactive in taking initiatives
* Strong salesmanship with a results‑oriented mindset
* Excellent communication skills
* A strong team player with a flexible, solution‑driven approach
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements and efficient ways of working



  

  





**WHO WE ARE** 

  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US** 
**​** 

  

 Additional information:
   

  

 This is position has it's placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





**​ Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​**

title: Back End Developer
description:
**About Fika Jobs** 




 Hiring is becoming more automated on both sides.
 



  





 Candidates use AI to apply. Companies use AI to screen. And somewhere in the middle, we are losing the actual person.
 



  





 Fika Jobs is building a new way for people to find work where they can thrive.
 



  





 We believe it starts with a conversation - one that feels more like a fika: relaxed, honest and human.
 



  





 Instead of reducing people to CVs, cover letters and keywords, Fika lets candidates tell their story through an AI conversation: what they have built, what they are great at, what drives them and what they want to do next.
 



  





 Because in the wrong job, people fade. In the right one, they come alive.
 



  





 We recently announced our $4M pre-seed round and are building a small, extremely talent-dense team with people from companies like Spotify, Klarna and King.
 



  





 Now we are looking for exceptional people who want to join early, take real ownership and do the best work of their lives.
 



  





**The role** 




 We are looking for a Backend Engineer who wants to build the systems powering the next generation of hiring.
 



  





 You will work on the infrastructure behind candidate profiles, AI conversations, search, matching, integrations and company workflows.
 



  





 This is not a role where someone else makes every architectural decision for you. We want you to understand the problem, form a view and own the solution.
 



  





 What you'll own
 


* Build the backend systems powering Fika Jobs
* Work on candidate profiles, AI conversations, search, matching, integrations and company workflows
* Design systems that are reliable, fast and ready to scale
* Make foundational technical decisions with real product impact
* Help define the technical foundation of a category-defining company



  





 Who you are
 


* You are an exceptional backend engineer with strong system design judgment
* You have extremely high agency and take ownership beyond the code you write
* You care about reliability, performance and clean architecture
* You move quickly without needing detailed instructions
* You want freedom, responsibility and a very high bar



  





**Tech stack** 




 Today, we work with Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, AWS and PostgreSQL.
 



  





 That said, we care much more about exceptional engineering ability, product judgment and ownership than experience with any specific technology. Great people learn fast, and we care more about how you think and what you can build.
 



  





**Why join Fika Jobs** 




 You will have the freedom to make important decisions, the responsibility to follow them through and the opportunity to build systems used by thousands of candidates and ambitious technology companies.
 



  





 There is very little bureaucracy, no endless approval chains and no hiding behind narrow responsibilities.
 



  





 This is a role for people who want to do the best work of their career and help build the infrastructure for a new category in hiring.
 



  





**How to apply** 




 No cover letter needed.
 



  





 Apply using the link and take our AI conversation. It is your chance to tell your story in your own words - what you have built, the technical problems you enjoy solving and what you want to do next.
 



  





 The conversation helps us get to know the person behind the CV.
 



  





 Just be yourself. We would much rather hear how you think than read another polished application.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (.NET/React)
description:
**Do you like to deliver technically advanced systems with complex business logic?** 
**We are now looking for a senior full-stack developer who wants to work with If's systems for our largest customers.**
**About The Role**
 As a full-stack developer, you work with C#, Entity Framework, React, and Azure to deliver a modern backend with .NET Core along with a high-performance frontend based on TypeScript and React. You have a strong focus on code quality, use AI tools in development effectively, and strive to deliver according to modern architecture patterns, as the team does today.
   

  

 You'll use your analytical and technical skills to solve advanced problems while contributing to our journey to the web and learning a lot of new things. Learning is important at If, which is why we offer a wide range of opportunities for learning such as tech seminars, skills days, digital learning and lots of internal training as well as opportunities for certifications.
   

  

 Within IT Industrial Core Systems, you are involved in developing systems that help our colleagues in If Industrial to manage our largest customers and their insurance for e.g. factories, department stores, freight and personnel.
   

  

**We offer**
* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
* Lunch benefit
* High pension savings


**About The Team**
 You are a member of one of IT Industrial Core Systems' three agile development teams. Each team consists of four to five developers and a QA engineer who work together as a cross-functional agile team. The teams work closely with both product owners and architects to ensure that we deliver valuable features in the right way.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are looking for someone who is passionate about software development and wants to deliver high-quality code. You are self-motivated and are used to working with feedback to deliver the best possible results. You are good at communicating and collaborating to achieve common goals. You like to work with technically advanced systems and solve complex business logic in a smart way.
   

  

**You also have:**
* University education in computer science, systems development, IT or equivalent.
* Extensive knowledge of C#, .NET Core / Entity Framework / SQL Server.
* Extensive knowledge of the Azure platform.
* Experience in web development in TypeScript and React.
* Knowledge of agile development methods such as Scrum.
* Fluency in English.


**It is an advantage if you have (or want to learn):**
* Use of AI tools in development, such as GitHub Copilot.
* Domain-driven design (DDD).
* Proficiency in Swedish.


**More information and the recruitment process**
**Application** 
 : Submit your application with CV and answer the application questions no later than 2026-08-09. Screening and interviews will take place after the application deadline in August.
   

  

**Type of employment:** 
 Full-time permanent employment (100%).
   

  

**Location:** 
 Bergshamra, Stockholm.
   

  

**Start:** 
 By agreement.
   

  

 For more information, please contact Robert Gavelin, robert.gavelin@if.se

title: Build Engineer – Central Technology | Candy Crush Soda Saga
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 As a Build Engineer in Candy Crush Soda Saga, you’ll sit at the heart of how we create, test, and ship the game to millions of players worldwide. You’ll own and evolve our build and release pipelines, making sure developers can move fast with confidence across multiple platforms. You’ll blend hands-on engineering with problem solving, automation and collaboration – helping teams in Barcelona, Stockholm and beyond deliver high-quality features and content at scale.
   

  

 King’s second largest game, Candy Crush Soda Saga, is loved by millions of players worldwide, matching Swedish fish, rescued Soda gummy bears, and popped soda bottles to win points, defeat obstacles and progress through more than 11,000 levels. We’re an iconic team growing a sweeter future for one of the biggest casual mobile IPs in the world through attracting the world’s best talent. Our ambition is to continue crushing it for our players when it comes to creativity, product, and technology!
   

  

**Your Role Within the Kingdom**
* Work as part of the Candy Crush Soda Saga organisation, supporting teams in both Barcelona and Stockholm in a central role focused on development pipelines, multi-platform builds and releases.
* Design, build and maintain robust continuous integration / continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines that automate builds, tests and deployments for mobile platforms, using tools such as Jenkins or similar CI systems.
* Develop, improve and troubleshoot build systems using technologies like CMake, Gradle and Bazel ensuring fast, reliable and reproducible builds for C++ and Java-based components.
* Own the build environment end to end: monitor stability and performance, debug build failures, and proactively drive technical improvements and automation.
* Collaborate closely with game developers, shared tech teams and other build engineers across King to design solutions that fit both Soda-specific and shared technology needs.
* Contribute scripts and tooling (for example in Python, Groovy or similar scripting languages) to streamline day-to-day developer workflows and reduce manual effort.
* Champion quality by enforcing good practices in configuration management, versioning, dependency handling, and release processes.
* Share knowledge, documentation and guidelines so that teams can use the build systems effectively and understand how to debug common issues.
* Work largely independently on moderately complex problems, selecting appropriate methods and techniques, while providing regular status updates to your manager and guiding more junior colleagues when needed.


**Tech environment (indicative)**
* Languages: scripting in Python and/or Groovy; Experience with C++ required (not necessarily expert level); Java is a plus.
* Build / CI tools: CMake, Gradle, Jenkins (or similar CI systems), working primarily in UNIX-like environments. Bazel and Build-Kite is a plus.
* Collaboration: close partnership with cross-functional game teams (engineering, product, analytics, creative) within Soda and with shared technology groups across King.


**Experience**
**Skills to Create Thrills**
* Proven experience as a build, infrastructure, or software engineer working with automated build and release pipelines in a professional environment.
* Hands-on background with CI systems (for example Jenkins or similar) for build automation, integration and release workflows.
* Experience with Git workflows
