title: UX/UI Designer – PostNord App, Solna
description:
Vill du göra vardagen enklare för våra nordiska användare?


Vill du designa produkter som används av miljontals människor varje månad – och göra vardagen lite enklare för kunder i hela Norden?


Vi söker nu en UX/UI Designer till vårt Consumer Apps‑team, med fokus på PostNord Appen som idag används brett i Sverige, Danmark och Finland - och snart även i Norge. Här får du arbeta med en produkt där varje detalj du designar gör skillnad.


Som UX/UI Designer hos oss arbetar du hands-on genom hela designprocessen - från att förstå problem och användarbehov till att ta fram lösningar som implementeras i produkten.


Rollen har en tydlig tyngd på UI och visuellt hantverk. Samtidigt handlar arbetet mycket om att navigera komplexitet – förstå affärsregler, samordna med stakeholders och driva initiativ framåt i organisationen.  

  



**Du kommer:**

* Ta del av ägandeskap för design av konkreta flows, funktioner och gränssnitt
* Skapa wireframes, interaktionsdesign, prototyper och färdig UI
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet, tillgänglighet och konsistens i leveranser
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att säkerställa att design är genomförbar
* Kollaborera med produktägare och stakeholders för att driva lösningar framåt
* Du blir en viktig del i att realisera och vidareutveckla designarbetet tillsammans med UX Lead.
**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

At PostNord, we value our employees and reward them with competitive salaries, great working conditions, and amazing benefits and discounts.


One of the benefits you can enjoy is joining The PostNord Plus personnel foundation, which offers you a wide range of activities and deals in holidays, sports, culture and wellness.


PostNord is a fantastic place to work and grow! We have a diverse and talented team of people who work in different roles and locations across the Nordic region.


We offer the prestigious PostNord Professionals program to help talented employees develop and prepare for senior roles


**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------

**Vi tror att du:**

* Har erfarenhet av att designa digitala produkter för native appar (UX/UI)
* Är trygg i att arbeta självständigt, men också öppen för feedback och vägledning
* Har ett starkt öga för UI, detaljer och visuellt hantverk
* Har djup kunskap i Figma (inkl. komponenter, variabler eller liknande arbetssätt)
* Förstår hur man designar robusta flöden med olika states och edge cases
* Har god förståelse för både UX och UI – och hur de samverkar i praktiken
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta nära utvecklare och navigera tekniska begränsningar
* Har kunskap om WCAG och tillgänglighet
* Är självgående och driver arbete framåt i en komplex miljö
* Är stark i stakeholder management och kommunikation

Vi lägger stor vikt vid inställning och arbetssätt. Vi tror att du gillar att lösa problem, samarbeta och ta dig an komplexa utmaningar – snarare än att enbart fokusera på “nya features” eller stora redesigns.  

  

  

  

**Extra viktigt i rollen:**

* Förståelse för plattformsspecifika designprinciper (iOS / Android) och deras begränsningar
* Förmåga att motivera designbeslut utifrån dessa principer
* Erfarenhet av designsystem – du behöver inte äga ett, men ska kunna arbeta och bidra i ett
* Förmåga att skapa och arbeta med komponenter och strukturer i större skalor

**Meriterande:**

* Erfarenhet av större organisationer eller komplexa produktmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av mobilappar med hög användarvolym
* Intresse för hur AI kan användas för att effektivisera design- eller arbetsflöden
* Erfarenhet av verktyg/arbetsflöden som Jira, design tokens eller liknande

**Vad du kan förvänta dig:**

* Arbeta med en produkt med miljontals användare i Norden
* Vara en del av ett team där design spelar en viktig roll i produktutvecklingen
* Samarbeta tätt med utveckling och produkt i vardagen
* Möjlighet att påverka både detaljer och helhetsupplevelse

**Vi gör vardagen enklare**

PostNord är den ledande leverantören av kommunikations- och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Vi säkerställer postservicen till privatpersoner och företag i Sverige och Danmark. Vi strävar efter att göra vardagen enklare och mer hållbar för alla som bor och arbetar i Norden. Vi är ansvarstagande, modiga och engagerade, och leder effektivt förändring oavsett om vi leder oss själva eller andra. Vi uppmuntrar lagarbete, uppriktighet och positiva relationer på arbetsplatsen. Vi bygger vidare på våra framgångar och lär oss av både kollegor och misstag. Människor med olika bakgrund arbetar hos oss. Du kommer därför vara en del av en arbetsplats med stor mångfald, vilket bidrar till bättre resultat för verksamheten. Besök oss på www.postnord.com.


**Ansök**

Vad väntar du på? Välkommen med din ansökan! Urval sker löpande, men på grund av semestertider kan återkoppling komma att dröja något – vi planerar att tidigast återkomma som **tidigast i mitten på augusti.**  



Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!


**Några av våra medarbetare**
-----------------------------

**Hannes Andersson**
Product Owner


"I had already been working with cross border mail at Arlanda so it was a natural step to further develop and understand the global logistics when jumping aboard Direct Link. The best thing about the role is that there’s so much going on at all time. As the global logistic market is constantly evolving, you need to be able to make quick and sound decisions and have really good communication. Another great thing is the cultural aspect which can be both challenging and rewarding when we’re practically doing business all around the world!"
**Åsa Edde**
Product Owner


"During my many years at PostNord, I have worked with development within the customer meeting area and the technology around it. As a Product Owner in the Analytics & Automation team, I can work with a long-term, strategic perspective and apply new technology to automate and streamline customer meetings and business processes among other things. New technology is changing the entire customer experience and our working methods. PostNord is really at the forefront of advanced, smart solutions. The culture is very innovative, which makes it very inspiring and satisfying to work here. We face the future with innovations. Automation is a very interesting area where I think we will see a rapid development in the future. Working here at PostNord with its history and as a company that so many people can relate to is both challenging and important. I really can´t imagine a more exciting and developing job."
**Om företaget**
----------------

PostNord offers communications and logistics solutions to, from and within the Nordic region. With our expertise and a unique distribution network, we are developing the basis for tomorrow’s communication, e-commerce, distribution and logistics.

  



**Accountable** 


We see the bigger picture and take ownership to continuously improve our business and systematically share best practices.
**Brave ❤**


By challenging current situations, we can prioritize effectively and focus on the things that matter the most. We lead a business that is in constant change.
**Committed** 


It is important that we listen, pursuing development and asking each other for feedback. Together we create an inclusive workplace where our people can thrive.
company_description: Ledande leverantören av kommunikation och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Genom vår expertis och ett starkt distributionsnät.

title: E-commerce Manager till snabbväxande startup inom hälsa och lifestyle
description:
Vill du vara med och bygga upp e-handeln för ett snabbväxande startupbolag inom hälsa och lifestyle? Nu söker vi en affärsdriven och analytisk E-commerce Manager som vill ta en nyckelroll i bolagets digitala tillväxtresa inför lanseringen efter sommaren.
  
Du blir en del av ett entreprenöriellt bolag inom hälsa och kosttillskott som backas av välrenommerade investerare och står inför en större lansering i slutet av augusti. Här får du möjlighet att vara med från början och bygga upp en modern, skalbar och kommersiellt stark e-handel med fokus på kundupplevelse, tillväxt och konvertering.
  
Om tjänsten I rollen som E-commerce Manager ansvarar du för att driva, utveckla och optimera bolagets digitala försäljningskanaler. Rollen är bred och innefattar allt från konverteringsoptimering och analys till kampanjplanering, UX/UI och teknisk utveckling av e-handelsplattformen.
  
Du arbetar nära content, marknad, logistik och externa partners för att säkerställa en sömlös kundupplevelse och stark försäljning online. Rollen kräver både strategiskt tänkande och ett operativt driv där du snabbt kan omsätta idéer och insikter till konkreta förbättringar.
  
  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**  

Ansvara för e-handelsplattformens utveckling och funktionalitet
  
  

Analysera trafik, konvertering, kundbeteenden och försäljning
  
  

Optimera UX/UI och den digitala kundresan
  
  

Planera och koordinera kampanjer tillsammans med marknad och contentteam
  
  

Säkerställa att webb, innehåll och erbjudanden är kommersiellt optimerade
  
  

**Arbeta datadrivet med KPI:** er och löpande förbättringar
  
  

Samarbeta med externa partners och utvecklare kring tekniska lösningar
  
  

Identifiera nya affärsmöjligheter, trender och digitala initiativ
  
  

Bidra till att bygga effektiva processer för e-handel och digital tillväxt
  
  

**Din profil:** Vi söker dig som är datadriven, kommersiell och har ett starkt intresse för digital försäljning och kundresor. Du trivs i en snabbföränderlig miljö där du får kombinera strategi med operativt arbete och vara med och påverka både affär och upplevelse från grunden.
  
  

Har erfarenhet inom e-handel, digital försäljning eller liknande roll
  
  

Är analytisk och van att arbeta datadrivet
  
  

Har förståelse för konverteringsoptimering, kundresa och UX/UI
  
  

Har god teknisk förståelse och systemvana
  
  

Är kommersiell och har ett starkt affärsfokus
  
  

Är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
  
  

Trivs i en entreprenöriell miljö med högt tempo och snabba beslut
  
  

Är flytande i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska
  
  

**Meriterande med:**  

Erfarenhet från startup, D2C eller snabbväxande e-handelsbolag
  
  

Kunskap inom Shopify, Google Analytics, Klaviyo eller liknande verktyg
  
  

Erfarenhet av SEO/SEM, CRM eller performance marketing
  
  

Intresse för hälsa, lifestyle eller wellness
  
  

Du erbjuds
  
  

Möjlighet att vara med från början och bygga upp bolagets e-handel
  
  

En nyckelroll i ett snabbväxande och entreprenöriellt bolag
  
  

Stor möjlighet att påverka strategi, tillväxt och kundupplevelse
  
  

Ett ambitiöst team med högt tempo och stark laganda
  
  

En dynamisk arbetsmiljö där idéer, initiativ och utveckling uppskattas
  
  

Du blir en del av ett spännande startupbolag inom wellness som står inför en större lansering efter sommaren. Bolaget backas av välrenommerade investerare och har ambitiösa tillväxtplaner med målsättningen att snabbt etablera sig hos både nätbaserade och fysiska återförsäljare. Rollen passar dig som trivs i en entreprenöriell miljö där tempot är högt, idéerna många och där man tillsammans hittar lösningar för att driva bolaget framåt inför den planerade lanseringen i slutet av augusti.
  
Anställningen är en heltidsanställning och du utgår från företagets kontor i centrala Stockholm.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
This is a unique opportunity to take a key role in developing advanced video applications that enable searchable event detection in logistics operations. As a Senior Software Engineer, you will play a key role in the design and development of applications that enable users to combine metadata and video footage across large-scale datasets.
  
In this role, you will develop and deliver scalable, high-quality software, take ownership of technical solutions, and contribute to architectural decisions and engineering practices. You will work closely with product owners, UX/UI designers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure every solution meets business goals while delivering real value to users.
  
As a senior member of the team, you will help raise the technical bar through knowledge sharing, code reviews, mentoring, and collaboration. You will have the opportunity to influence how we build software while remaining hands-on and solving complex technical challenges.
  
We are looking for a results-driven, pragmatic engineer with a collaborative mindset and a positive attitude. You enjoy solving complex technical challenges while keeping sight of the long-term vision, prioritization, and sound engineering practices. You take ownership, provide clarity in technical discussions, and contribute to a culture of high-quality, impactful software development.
  
Our team is based in Lund, and you will report to the Software Development Manager.
  
  

**Required Skills and Experience:**  

* 5+ years of experience as a Backend or Full-Stack Engineer
* Advanced proficiency in Golang and Python, with a proven track record of building production-grade services
* Hands-on experience with MongoDB, Elasticsearch, or similar NoSQL and search technologies
* Proficiency in Vue.js or a comparable frontend framework for building user interfaces
* Experience implementing automated testing, including unit tests, integration tests, and CI pipelines
* Strong understanding of distributed system design and service-to-service communication using REST, MQTT, Kafka, or similar technologies
* Experience taking ownership of technical solutions and contributing to software architecture decisions
* Ability to collaborate effectively across teams and communicate technical concepts clearly


**Desirable Skills and Experience:**  

* Experience working with video protocols such as RTSP, HLS, or MPEG-DASH
* Experience with Cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure or Google Cloud Platform, distributed architectures, and modern communication protocols
* Working knowledge of Docker, containerized environments, and deployment workflows
* Experience mentoring engineers or driving technical improvements within a development team


Apply by sending your CV/résumé to apply@sibsolutions.com.
  
If you have any questions about the position, feel free to contact:
  
daniel.hindemith@sibsolutions.com
  
Please note that during the summer holiday period, response times may be slightly longer than usual. We appreciate your patience and will get back to you as soon as possible.
  
**To recruiters:** We kindly decline calls and emails from recruitment companies as we have already decided on the process for this recruitment.
  
About SiB Solutions
  
SiB Solutions is a logistics technology company enabling flawless logistics. Our Intelligent Video and AI Services provide logistics-intensive companies superior visibility and visual insights into their logistics processes. Companies can reduce costs, improve quality, strengthen their brands, and even act in an eco-friendlier way.
  
SiB Solutions was founded in 2017. Today we are a diverse team rapidly scaling up and going global. Our HQ is at Ideon Science Park in Lund, Sweden. Together with our customers and partner network we persistently explore new ways to change the world of logistics by combining cutting-edge technologies and native logistics know-how.
  
We honor our core values passionate and curious, humble and bold, professional and with high integrity.
  
**The SiB Solutions Golden Circle:** why, how and what
  
* Our purpose: Change the world of logistics through cutting-edge technology.
* How we make the future happen: We deliver on our customer promise: One step closer to flawless logistics – every day. We are explorers with strong values. We are scaling up. This means that we as a scale-up are building out to be a scalable company.
* What we offer: Intelligent Video and AI Services. Profitable, flawless logistics processes through visual evidence and superior visual insights.

title: Frilansande UX/Copywriter eller Brand/marketing copywriter? Se hit!
description:
**Sambla Group is a fintech company with a clear goal – to be your trusted financial partner. We’ve grown into one of the fastest-growing fintech companies - bridging the gap between borrowers and lenders - thanks to the 500+ amazing people who work here.**


Vi söker nu två frilansande copyprofiler till ett 8 veckor långt projekt med syfte att implementera vår Tone of Voice och bygga en skalbar copyproduktion.  

I uppdraget ingår att uppdatera befintlig copy på en rad olika ytor – från webbplatsens produkt- och kategorisidor till UX‑flöden och andra kundresor, kampanj- och landningssidor, CRM‑kommunikation (som e‑post och andra utskick) samt övrigt content och marknadsföringsmaterial.


UX‑copy och brand‑copy kommer att arbeta i nära samarbete för att säkerställa en sammanhållen kundupplevelse genom hela tratten. Tillsammans balanserar ni tydlighet, konvertering och varumärkesupplevelse, samtidigt som ni etablerar strukturer, mallar och arbetsflöden som gör framtida copyproduktion skalbar. Arbetet sker i tätt partnerskap med SEO/GEO, där ni utgår från nyckelord, sökintention och geo‑specifika insikter och prioriteringar, med målet att all copy ska driva både trafik, relevans och konvertering.


En central del av projektet är även att träna och implementera AI‑drivna copy‑agenter. Det innebär att ni är med och definierar arbetssätt, prompts och strukturer för AI‑stödd copyproduktion, och säkerställer kvalitet, tonalitet och varumärkeslinje när AI används som stöd. Utöver att förbättra befintligt material ansvarar ni för att identifiera och producera nytt innehåll – till exempel nya landningssidor, produktcopy och microcopy, CRM‑flöden och kampanjer – samt att skapa skalbara mallar för framtida behov, som nya produkter, kampanjer och marknader.

### **Din profil – UX/Copywriter**


Vi söker dig som:

* Har längre erfarenhet av UX‑copy/microcopy och konverteringsdriven text
* Har arbetat nära produkt, UX‑designers och utvecklare i digitala flöden
* Känner dig trygg i att förenkla komplex information till tydliga och användarvänliga budskap
* Är van att A/B‑testa budskap, arbeta hypotesdrivet och följa upp effekt
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift (krav)
* Trivs i ett högt tempo där du snabbt kan skifta mellan olika ytor och format

### **Din profil – Brand/marketing copywriter**


Vi söker dig som:

* Har flera års erfarenhet av konceptuellt och varumärkesbyggande copyarbete från inhouse miljö
* Kan översätta varumärkesstrategi och Tone of Voice till konkreta budskap i kampanjer, CRM och content
* Är van att arbeta med digitala kampanjer, landningssidor och always‑on‑kommunikation
* Är trygg i att skapa copy på både övergripande konceptnivå och i detaljerad produktion
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift (krav)
* Gillar att samarbeta tätt med designers, marknadsförare, SEO‑specialister och produktteam

**Oavsett vilken av rollerna du främst identifierar dig med tror vi att du:**

* Har erfarenhet från en regulatorisk verksamhet; till fördel från bank eller försäkringsbolag
* Är nyfiken på, och positiv till, att arbeta tillsammans med AI‑stöd som en naturlig del av din process
* Är strukturerad, självgående och van vid att driva projekt mot tydliga deadlines
* Har lätt för att bygga förtroende och samarbeta med olika stakeholders
* Tänker skalbart – du skapar inte bara bra texter, utan också arbetssätt, mallar och strukturer som kan leva vidare

### **Praktisk information**

* Uppdragsform: Frilans/konsult, du fakturerar via eget bolag eller motsvarande
* Omfattning: 8 veckors projekt med fast arvode
* Start: September 2026 eller enligt överenskommelse
* Placering: Stockholm (med möjlighet till viss flexibilitet)
* Språk: Svenska som arbetsspråk

title: UX Designer
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a UX Designer with strong AI experience to help shape not only the products we design, but also how design is practiced, specified, scaled, and implemented across our global product organisation.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to join an industry still in an early stage of digital maturity, where you can have a significant impact. We see customer experience as a critical differentiator and an important part of our ambition to transform the global property management industry.
   

  

 You’ll join a global design team led by the Head of CX & UX in Stockholm, Sweden. This role combines hands-on UX and interaction design in our AI team with helping the wider design team scale quality, consistency, design systems, and AI-assisted product development workflows globally. You will collaborate with the global design team and support knowledge sharing across all our markets, including the UK, Europe, the US, and Mexico. As part of this role, you will shape both intuitive customer-facing experiences and complex internal workflows for property management employees.
   

  

 You will help mature how our design team works across markets, products, and disciplines. This includes improving design system structure, documentation, governance, and adoption; defining practical quality standards; and establishing clearer ways of working across Figma, design specifications, no-code tools, and AI-assisted development workflows.
   

  

 AI will be central to how we evolve our design practice going forward, balancing the efficiency of AI agents with the judgement, taste, and craft of experienced designers. Experience in both DesignOps and AI-assisted design and development will therefore be a strong advantage.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Work and lead the “ordinary” design process within product teams - translating user needs, business goals, and technical constraints into clear flows, prototypes, interaction design to test and learn iteratively.
* Define design practices for agent driven development workflows, and how design artefacts should be specified so they can be used effectively by designers, product managers, engineers, and agents. Eg specification formats, reusable prompts, design skills, MCPs, and validation methods.
* Define how design artefacts — such as user flows, service blueprints, prototypes, component specifications, interaction rules, and acceptance criteria — can better steer and validate AI-assisted implementation.
* Support more efficient research and validation practices, like how we evaluate product iterations and AI-generated outputs against user needs, design system standards, accessibility expectations, and product quality criteria. This includes, for example, defining/creating tools for research planning, recruitment processes, GDPR considerations, research templates, and maintaining a research repository.
* Lead the work with the Odevo design system(s) by improving component documentation, governance, accessibility standards, usage guidance, and alignment between design components/patterns and code.


**Who You Are**
 You are genuinely interested in understanding people’s needs, behaviours, and motivations, and you use that insight to shape services that deliver real value. You combine strong design craft with systems thinking and can move comfortably between user needs, business outcomes, service journeys, and detailed interaction design.
   

  

 You strive for quality, value collaboration over prestige, and enjoy contributing to a strong team culture. You are a strong communicator who can turn research insights and design rationale into shared understanding across teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 You enjoy making design work more legible, scalable, and repeatable. You care about the craft of design, but also about the systems, rituals, documentation, and standards that help teams deliver good design consistently. You are comfortable moving between hands-on product design and improving the underlying ways of working that support the wider design organisation.
   

  

 You are pragmatic about AI: curious and experimental, but also thoughtful about quality, trust, transparency, human oversight, and when AI should or should not be used.
   

  

**Experience**
* 5+ years of experience as a UX Designer, Product Designer, or similar role, working on complex digital products.
* Bachelor’s degree in design, HCI, behavioural science, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Strong proficiency in Figma, prototyping, interaction design, UX research, service design, and design systems.
* Experience designing web and mobile products for complex, data-rich, workflow-heavy, or operational environments.
* Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams with product managers, engineers, designers, and stakeholders.
* Experience contributing to DesignOps and design systems, including documentation, governance, quality standards, tooling, ResearchOps, and alignment between design and code.
* Experience with AI-driven design or development workflows, including how structured specifications, component rules, interaction logic, and acceptance criteria can guide AI-assisted implementation.
* Experience designing AI-enabled product experiences, such as intelligent search, automation, recommendations, copilots, or decision-support tools.
* Property management or proptech experience is a plus.


**What We Offer**
* Professional growth - to work with the most talented developers in the industry.
* Modern technology - we invest in the latest technologies and tools and encourage our team members to share their ideas and take ownership of their work.
* Innovation - to work on exciting projects that push the boundaries of our industry and make a real impact.
* Commitment to quality - a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values profitable and long-term product development.


**Sounds like you?** 
 Apply today!
   

  

 #msl
   

  

 From 30 K to 2,2 million homes under Management in 5 years
   

  

 year est.
   

  

 Homes
   

  

 colleagues
   

  

 Markets
   

  

 property owners

title: Junior Brand Designer
description:
**Kurppa Hosk is looking for a Junior Brand Designer to join our team in Stockholm!**
 In this role, you will work closely with our brand strategists, digital designers, and other highly skilled creatives in our field to develop and deploy outstanding brand identities and visual experiences. As a Junior Brand Designer, you are curious, ambitious, and eager to grow your craft within branding and visual design.
   

  

 You will support senior colleagues on medium- to large-scale brand projects and gradually take ownership of defined tasks and deliverables. You are structured, detail-oriented, and motivated to continuously improve your skills. You thrive in a collaborative environment and are excited to contribute to projects for some of the world’s leading brands.
   

  

 You have a portfolio that demonstrates strong visual sensibility, attention to detail, and a clear interest in brand identity systems.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Support senior designers in brand design projects from concept to final delivery
* Contribute to idea generation and visual exploration
* Develop and refine visual identities, typography, color palettes, and layout systems
* Assist in creating brand guidelines and preparing presentation material
* Help develop and apply brand identity systems across physical and digital touchpoints
* Ensure visual consistency across platforms and applications
* Maintain high craft standards in typography, layout, composition, and detailing
* Stay updated on design tools, trends, and cultural movements
* Collaborate closely with team members across disciplines


**Qualifications**
* Relevant education within graphic design, visual communication or similar
* 2+ years of experience in brand or graphic design (internships included)
* Demonstrated skills in relevant software (e.g. Adobe Creative Suite, Figma; motion skills are a plus)
* Strong interest in brand identity systems and how they scale across touchpoints
* Fluent in English; additional languages (including Swedish) are a plus


 Application requirements
   

  

 To be considered, you must include your resume and a link to your portfolio with your recent and best work. We use your portfolio as a key part of our evaluation of candidates. If you have a password-protected portfolio, don't forget to submit your username and password as well.
   

  

 Kurppa Hosk is a brand agency with 200+ employees and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, New York, Chicago and Amsterdam.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Product Designer
description:
**What will you do?**
 As a Product Designer you will be part of a small team, achieving big things. You will be leading the design of our applications and web, impacting the experience of millions of users each month.
   

  

 The role includes taking ownership of design ideas through the research, wireframing and high-fidelity visuals to the final product and beyond. You should be able to champion user research and usability testing across the company as well as help to ensure a high level of quality and consistency across Rebtel’s products. We think that nothing is ever complete and that everything can always improve. Rebtel is a dynamic place where the best solution wins - no matter where it comes from.
   

  

**Areas Of Ownership**
* Own the end-to-end design process, from research and wireframing to high-fidelity visuals, final product delivery, and ongoing iteration
* Champion user research and usability testing across the organization
* Ensure high quality and consistency across all of Rebtel’s products
* Drive continuous improvement, embracing a mindset that nothing is ever truly finished
* Contribute to a culture where the best ideas win, regardless of origin
* Act as a collaborative team player in a small, high-impact team environment
* Share ideas and perspectives beyond your core area of expertise
* Work cross-functionally with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders


**Requirements**
* You are an excellent communicator and collaborator. We work in English, but you will hear many languages in our Stockholm office
* The tools you use are secondary but you should have your own views on what processes could be adopted when taking an idea from research to wireframe to prototype to final design
* The ability to develop solutions to design problems that are as beautiful as they are functional
* Strong visual design competence
* An interest in new apps and app design trends
* 5 years of proven experience in app and web design
* Experience with user research, usability testing and A/B testing
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in a similar role


**Why Rebtel?**
 Rebtel has been connecting people across borders for nearly 20 years. Today, we’re profitable, growing, and at a pivotal moment in our journey. As we enter our next phase, we’re building an organisation designed for speed, ownership, and real impact, where every role contributes directly to shaping what comes next.
   

  

 This is a place with global ambition and a strong foundation, where ideas move quickly and decisions matter. You won’t get lost in layers of process or slow-moving structures. Instead, you’ll find the space to take ownership, collaborate across teams, and make meaningful contributions from day one. Based in Stockholm, we bring together a diverse, international team united by a shared purpose: to simplify the way people connect worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:
   

  

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.


*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
 Rebtel is a company of about 70 people from 31 countries who share a common mission to empower diaspora communities around the world to stay connected to where they come from. From our office in central Stockholm, we help our user base of 1 million dual-culture people—predominantly from the global south—connect with and support their communities through affordable data-free international calling and mobile top-ups. With our app and online platform, we help dissolve the space between their worlds so they can live more connected lives.

title: Design Director (visual/digital)
description:
Above is looking for a Design Director to join our creative team based in our Stockholm studio. This is a permanent full-time role.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Visual Design Director you will be a key player in driving cutting-edge design and innovation projects for some of the world’s most exciting brands. You will help us identify and secure new commercial opportunities, acting as a strategic partner for new and existing clients.
   

  

 With a high level of conceptual thinking, you will have a direct impact in shaping excellent project deliveries through craft and creativity, while also shaping our culture, team capabilities, and ways of working across disciplines.
   

  

 Our work is exciting and diverse in nature, spanning digital experiences such as websites, apps, and HMI. We collaborate across disciplines to create impact across all organizational levels and future horizons — from category-defining hero products to multidimensional digital ecosystems.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for an inspiring, forward-thinking Design Director who demonstrates excellence in craft, creativity, leadership, and emerging technologies:
   

  

* Forward-thinking approach to digital product experiences, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Holistic thinker with strong conceptualization skills and critical-thinking abilities, comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders across design, technology, and business
* Demonstrated commercial experience in selling impactful digital experience projects — ideally supported by a strong professional network
* Strong storytelling and client leadership, with the ability to clearly communicate ideas and thought processes to both peers and clients
* Preferably 10+ years of professional experience, including familiarity with fast-paced agency environments and workflows
* Ability to lead, mentor, and grow multidisciplinary design teams, fostering creative excellence, psychological safety, and high performance
* Ability to lead clients through complex challenges and structure design processes that enable diverse teams to succeed
* Aesthetic sensibility in harmony with a thoughtful, user-centered approach to design, business, and technology
* Experience using — or actively driving — AI-enabled design workflows to explore ideas faster, prototype more intelligently, and elevate creative and strategic outcomes
* Ability to translate emerging AI capabilities into meaningful design direction, team practices, and client value
* A humble, self-propelled, and collaborative team player who feels at home in multi-competence project constellations


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy, and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware and software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse international backgrounds. In everything we do, we strive for world-class results and believe you share that mindset.
   

  

 Join a team that values collaboration, creativity, and tangible impact through thoughtful design.
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio, CV, and personal letter.
   

  

 We welcome international applications and are generally able to assist with work permits and relocation.

title: UX/UI Designer – PostNord App, Solna
description:
Vill du göra vardagen enklare för våra nordiska användare?
   

  

 Vill du designa produkter som används av miljontals människor varje månad – och göra vardagen lite enklare för kunder i hela Norden?
   

  

 Vi söker nu en UX/UI Designer till vårt Consumer Apps‑team, med fokus på PostNord Appen som idag används brett i Sverige, Danmark och Finland - och snart även i Norge. Här får du arbeta med en produkt där varje detalj du designar gör skillnad.
   

  

 Som UX/UI Designer hos oss arbetar du hands-on genom hela designprocessen - från att förstå problem och användarbehov till att ta fram lösningar som implementeras i produkten.
   

  

 Rollen har en tydlig tyngd på UI och visuellt hantverk. Samtidigt handlar arbetet mycket om att navigera komplexitet – förstå affärsregler, samordna med stakeholders och driva initiativ framåt i organisationen.
   

  

**Du Kommer**
* Ta del av ägandeskap för design av konkreta flows, funktioner och gränssnitt
* Skapa wireframes, interaktionsdesign, prototyper och färdig UI
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet, tillgänglighet och konsistens i leveranser
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att säkerställa att design är genomförbar
* Kollaborera med produktägare och stakeholders för att driva lösningar framåt
* Du blir en viktig del i att realisera och vidareutveckla designarbetet tillsammans med UX Lead.


**Vi Tror Att Du**
* Har erfarenhet av att designa digitala produkter för native appar (UX/UI)
* Är trygg i att arbeta självständigt, men också öppen för feedback och vägledning
* Har ett starkt öga för UI, detaljer och visuellt hantverk
* Har djup kunskap i Figma (inkl. komponenter, variabler eller liknande arbetssätt)
* Förstår hur man designar robusta flöden med olika states och edge cases
* Har god förståelse för både UX och UI – och hur de samverkar i praktiken
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta nära utvecklare och navigera tekniska begränsningar
* Har kunskap om WCAG och tillgänglighet
* Är självgående och driver arbete framåt i en komplex miljö
* Är stark i stakeholder management och kommunikation


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid inställning och arbetssätt. Vi tror att du gillar att lösa problem, samarbeta och ta dig an komplexa utmaningar – snarare än att enbart fokusera på “nya features” eller stora redesigns.
   

  

**Extra Viktigt i Rollen**
* Förståelse för plattformsspecifika designprinciper (iOS / Android) och deras begränsningar
* Förmåga att motivera designbeslut utifrån dessa principer
* Erfarenhet av designsystem – du behöver inte äga ett, men ska kunna arbeta och bidra i ett
* Förmåga att skapa och arbeta med komponenter och strukturer i större skalor


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av större organisationer eller komplexa produktmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av mobilappar med hög användarvolym
* Intresse för hur AI kan användas för att effektivisera design- eller arbetsflöden
* Erfarenhet av verktyg/arbetsflöden som Jira, design tokens eller liknande


**Vad Du Kan Förvänta Dig**
* Arbeta med en produkt med miljontals användare i Norden
* Vara en del av ett team där design spelar en viktig roll i produktutvecklingen
* Samarbeta tätt med utveckling och produkt i vardagen
* Möjlighet att påverka både detaljer och helhetsupplevelse


**Vi gör vardagen enklare**
 PostNord är den ledande leverantören av kommunikations- och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Vi säkerställer postservicen till privatpersoner och företag i Sverige och Danmark. Vi strävar efter att göra vardagen enklare och mer hållbar för alla som bor och arbetar i Norden. Vi är ansvarstagande, modiga och engagerade, och leder effektivt förändring oavsett om vi leder oss själva eller andra. Vi uppmuntrar lagarbete, uppriktighet och positiva relationer på arbetsplatsen. Vi bygger vidare på våra framgångar och lär oss av både kollegor och misstag. Människor med olika bakgrund arbetar hos oss. Du kommer därför vara en del av en arbetsplats med stor mångfald, vilket bidrar till bättre resultat för verksamheten. Besök oss på www.postnord.com.
   

  

**Ansök**
 Vad väntar du på? Välkommen med din ansökan! Urval sker löpande, men på grund av semestertider kan återkoppling komma att dröja något – vi planerar att tidigast återkomma som
 **tidigast i mitten på augusti.**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Senior Product Designer – Core Experience
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 At Core Experience, we design many of Spotify’s most loved and most frequently used experiences. We help listeners discover, connect with, and build lasting relationships with the creators and content they care about most. Our designers work across a broad range of surfaces and product areas, partnering closely with cross-functional teams to shape experiences that reach hundreds of millions of listeners around the world.
   

  

 We're looking for a Senior Product Designer to join Format Foundations, a product area focused on Spotify’s core content formats and the creators behind them. The team works across experiences including artists and albums, podcasts, audiobooks, clips, countdown pages, and emerging formats. This role will have an immediate focus on shaping Spotify’s end-to-end Fitness experience while helping define the future of new content experiences on the platform.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design end-to-end product experiences that help listeners discover, engage with, and return to emerging content formats, including Fitness.
* Create intuitive, visually compelling experiences across mobile-first consumer journeys.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Engineers, Researchers, Data Scientists, and fellow Designers to define opportunities and deliver meaningful outcomes.
* Develop concepts, user flows, prototypes, and polished experiences that influence product strategy and execution.
* Explore how new content formats should be experienced within Spotify and identify opportunities to evolve the product experience.
* Shape experiences that strengthen the connection between listeners, creators, and content.
* Contribute to long-term format innovation initiatives that support Spotify's broader catalog expansion strategy.
* Leverage AI-powered workflows and emerging tools to accelerate design exploration, experimentation, and prototyping.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience designing high-quality consumer products with a strong focus on user experience, interaction design, and visual craft.
* You know how to create compelling prototypes that communicate ideas, test assumptions, and bring concepts to life.
* You are experienced designing for mobile platforms and understand the nuances of creating exceptional mobile-first experiences.
* You have strong visual design skills and a portfolio that demonstrates attention to detail and craft.
* You are proficient in Figma and comfortable working across the full product design process.
* You are curious about AI-enabled design workflows and are comfortable exploring tools such as Claude and other emerging technologies.
* You have experience collaborating with cross-functional partners across Product, Engineering, Research, and Data.
* You thrive in ambiguous spaces and enjoy helping define new products, experiences, and opportunities.
* You have experience translating brand principles into scalable product experiences.
* You care deeply about creating experiences that help users discover and build deeper relationships with content and creators.
* You are comfortable working with ambiguity and enjoy navigating open-ended challenges, helping teams create clarity and move ideas forward.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in-person meetings, while still allowing flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior Brand Designer
description:
**Kurppa Hosk is looking for a Senior Brand Designer to join our team in Stockholm!**
 In this role, you will work closely with our brand strategists, digital designers, and other highly skilled creatives in our field to develop and deploy outstanding brand identities and visual systems. As a Senior Brand Designer, you confidently lead brand design workstreams across medium- to large-sized projects – from initial concepts to fully realized identity systems and final delivery.
   

  

 You take clear ownership of your projects, proactively drive creative development, and ensure that the design solutions we deliver meet both brand and business objectives. You combine strong craft with structured thinking and are comfortable presenting and discussing your work with clients.
   

  

 As part of Kurppa Hosk, you will work with some of the world’s leading brands that seek true transformation. You are self-propelled, structured, detail-oriented, and collaborative — with a portfolio that showcases visually strong, well-crafted brand identity systems across a variety of touchpoints.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Lead brand design workstreams in medium to large projects
* Develop complete brand concepts and identity systems from start to finish
* Translate strategy and brand platforms into high-quality visual design solutions
* Drive creative development within assigned projects and teams
* Present and articulate design decisions confidently to clients
* Ensure graphic solutions are optimized for defined touchpoints, formats, materials, and sustainability requirements
* Secure high craft quality and consistency across all brand deliverables
* Mentor and support more junior designers
* Collaborate across disciplines and actively contribute to cross-agency initiatives
* Stay on top of industry trends and push brand creativity standards


**Qualifications**
* Relevant education within graphic design, visual communication, or similar
* Minimum 5–7 years of experience in brand or graphic design
* Proven experience developing and implementing comprehensive brand identity systems
* Demonstrated skills in relevant software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma; motion skills are a plus)
* Strong presentation and communication skills
* Fluent in English; additional languages (including Swedish) are a plus


 Application requirements
   

  

 To be considered, you must include your resume and a link to your portfolio with your recent and best work. We use your portfolio as a key part of our evaluation of candidates. If you have a password-protected portfolio, don't forget to submit your username and password as well.
   

  

 Kurppa Hosk is a brand agency with 200+ employees and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, New York, Chicago and Amsterdam.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Product Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love building products that truly delight at light speed. At your previous job you often felt impatient that your team’s next wave of improvements isn’t in your users' hands already. At Tandem you’ll be using that mindset to solve the problem that today clinicians are forced to work in systems that work against them rather than with them.
   

  

 As a Product Engineer at Tandem you’ll be shaping and building towards our product vision, working closely with designers, other engineers and our users. Owning and shipping features end to end, from understanding the user's pain-point through shipping it to clinicians all over Europe and polishing it to delight our users. You’re deeply technical, but ultimately, you’re motivated by crafting great products that solve real problems, and you’ll roll up your sleeves and get that done.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Own Product development end-to-end by defining product requirements, setting priorities, and translating ideas into technical specifications
* Partner directly with designers, users, and other engineers to shape and deliver impactful features.
* Design and implement scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
* Ensure applications provide an intuitive and seamless user experience, incorporating feedback from stakeholders and end-users.
* Maintain high standards of code quality through code reviews, testing, and documentation.
* Use the best modern tools to ship great features as fast as possible.


 What You Bring
   

  

* A strong product mindset with the ability to define, build, and ship impactful features end-to-end.
* Proven experience building and deploying production-grade  Python  systems.
* Strong programming skills in TypeScript and  React.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure and a focus on scalability and reliability
* A passion for technical excellence and a drive to deliver impactful solutions.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Experience in the healthcare industry or with health-related applications
* Experience building Large Language Model (LLM) applications.
* Experience handling streaming audio and transcription.
* Experience with Kubernetes and Azure


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

 How to Apply
   

  

 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Product Manager – AI
description:
**About Us**
**nShift** 
 is the leading global provider of cloud delivery management solutions (SaaS), we enable the frictionless shipment and return of almost one billion shipments across 190 countries each year. We are headquartered in London and Oslo and have over 500 employees across offices in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Poland, the Netherlands, Belgium, and Romania.
   

  

 Our software is used by many of the world leading e-commerce, retail, manufacturing, and 3PL shippers due to us having over 1000 carriers integrated into our platform, nearly 3 times more than our competitors!
   

  

 If you buy goods online, there is a strong chance that nShift has powered that delivery, so come and join us as we shape the future of shipping, one frictionless journey at a time.
   

  

**Purpose of the role**
 nShift is building a first-of-its-kind agentic AI product to transform how the logistics industry handles its most entrenched, manual workflows. Powered by autonomous AI agents and LLMs, nothing as it exists in the market today.
   

  

 This is not a conventional PM role. You'll be the 'Builder' inside a deliberately small, AI-augmented pod. The team model is intentional: a tight human core governing agents moves faster and makes better decisions than a large team operating conventionally.
   

  

 You'll have the rare combination of a private equity-backed platform company's customer base and resources, the energy of a genuine 0-to-1 build, and a unique agentic architecture that standalone competitors cannot replicate. You won't just launch a product; you'll create a new category.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
**Product Vision & Roadmap**
* Become the internal authority on the problem space, owning the customer pain points, workflows, and economics of the logistics industry.
* Own and communicate the product vision to engineering, sales, and leadership, and shape long-term strategy beyond near-term planning.
* Own the roadmap across a 3–6 month v1 build cycle, making hard prioritization calls to sequence features for maximum customer value and fastest path to market.
* Define validation criteria for every bet before scaling and know when to kill something as clearly as when to build it.


**Go-to-Market & Commercial Ownership**
* Build the value narrative for customer-side buyers, navigating to senior decision-makers and not just logistics managers.
* Define ICP, segmentation, and positioning against both legacy incumbents and modern AI-native entrants.
* Own pricing and packaging strategy. Own sales enablement, including battlecards, ROI frameworks, and product narrative.
* Drive early customer engagement from discovery through pilot design to case study development.


**Technical Product Leadership**
* Partner with engineering to guide productisation of AI agent capabilities into a scalable SaaS product, driving tradeoffs between quality, speed, and unit economics.
* Design the right human–AI collaboration model for each capability: when AI assists (human-in-the-loop), acts with oversight (human-on-the-loop), or operates autonomously.
* Leverage nShift's unique platform data to create defensible differentiation that standalone competitors cannot replicate.


**AI-Native Execution**
* Build functional prototypes using AI tooling to validate hypotheses before engineering commits to a full build.
* Make competitive research and customer feedback synthesis continuous and automated. Your time goes on interpreting and acting, not gathering.
* Write specs as intent and outcomes, not implementation instructions. Engineers and AI handle the how; you own the what and why.


**About You**
 You are AI-native, not AI-curious. You have fundamentally redesigned your workflows around AI agents and have strong, experience-backed opinions on how AI changes how product teams should be structured and products built.
   

  

 You thrive with high autonomy and a lean team. You are as comfortable presenting ROI to a CFO as you are writing a technical spec or running customer discovery - often on the same day. You don't need a clear playbook; you write it.
   

  

 You understand that in a small, AI-augmented pod, the constraint is not engineering capacity - it is strategic clarity, decision velocity, and prioritization discipline. That is where you spend your energy.
   

  

**What You Will Bring**
**Must-Have**
* AI-native working style: You use LLM assistants, AI coding tools, and prototyping agents as your default workflow, not occasional experiments. You can build functional proofs-of-concept independently.
* The ability to quickly acquire the necessary domain knowledge in freight and logistics. You either come with knowledge from before or with a proven ability to quickly learn about a new domain.
* Proven 0-to-1 AI product experience: You have personally driven an AI/ML-powered product from concept to paying customers and product-market fit in a PM role.
* 3+ years shipping B2B SaaS. A track record of getting products to market, not just planning them.
* Commercial acumen: You can build a business case, define pricing, and hold direct enterprise conversations about ROI.
* Deep understanding of AI/ML products: LLM pipelines, accuracy/cost/latency tradeoffs, data feedback loops, and productising AI for non-technical users.
* Excellent written and verbal English: you'll present to leadership, write specs, and run customer discovery, often on the same day.


**Nice to Have**
* Nordic or European market experience: regional carriers and the logistics landscape.
* Competitive displacement track record: positioning against well-funded incumbents and winning on differentiation.
* Platform product experience: launching a new product line within an existing ecosystem.
* Kindly ensure that your CV is submitted in English


 At nShift we believe in embracing diversity in all forms and fostering an inclusive environment for everyone which we believe is essential for our continued success. We're an equal-opportunity employer which means that all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, family or parental status, national origin, veteran, neurodiversity, or disability status.

title: AI Project Lead
description:
Are you ready to drive AI transformation for real? We are looking for Consultants for the Change & Delivery track within Curamando. In this role, you will play a key part in shaping how our clients work today and in the future. You will identify inefficiencies, redesign key processes, and drive cross‑functional initiatives that make organizations faster, smarter, and more scalable. A core part of the role is to accelerate AI and automation adoption. You will identify where AI creates the most value, translate opportunities into concrete initiatives, and help teams turn potential into real improvements in how work gets done.
   

  

**Purpose of the Role**
 As an AI Project Lead, you drive prioritized AI cases and development initiatives from early ideas through execution and adoption. Your focus is on digital product development, process optimization, and change management. You ensure that projects deliver measurable business value—tracking impact across efficiency, quality, and time savings—while gradually strengthening the client’s AI capability.
   

  

**Key Activities**
* AI Strategy: Map and analyze end‑to‑end processes to identify bottlenecks and opportunities. Evaluate and support use cases for AI and automation to improve workflows and decision‑making.
* Project Management: Establish project plans. Drive cross-functional initiatives from idea to implementation. Facilitate daily work, demos, and documentation. Lead steering group meetings.
* Change Management: Lead stakeholder collaboration through workshops and forums. Act as a change driver, helping teams adopt new ways of working in a pragmatic and scalable way. Be comfortable speaking about AI to large groups.
* Digital Product Development: Translate business needs into AI-driven features. Balance experimentation (PoC/MVP) against stable production deployment and lead the transition between phases.
* Impact & Governance: Prioritize initiatives and track impact (KPIs). Create status reports and risk mappings. Escalate obstacles and propose proactive measures.


**Who are you?**
 We are looking for an analytical problem-solver who can structure complex challenges and influence stakeholders in a hands-on way. To thrive, you should have:
   

  

* Background: At least 2 years experience from management consulting, project management, or roles focused on process improvement and operational excellence.
* Technical AI Understanding: Understanding of how GenAI and ML works. Knowledge of concepts like RAG, fine-tuning, evals, as well as prompt and context engineering.
* AI Tool Proficiency: Hands-on experience with tools like Microsoft Copilot, Gemini, Claude Code, or Lovable, and a strong interest in modern AI-enabled workflows and orchestration (e.g. LangChain, n8n, Copilot Studio)
* Change Leadership: Proven ability to lead change and drive improvements across cross-functional teams (developers, designers, domain experts, etc.).


**You will probably thrive here if you:**
* Enjoy combining strategic thinking with hands-on execution.
* Take ownership and drive AI initiatives from idea to real‑world impact.
* Are structured, pragmatic, and focused on outcomes rather than theory.
* Thrive in a collaborative, fast‑moving environment.


 We look forward to your application!
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Environment Artist
description:
Environment Artists create the physical space where the players experience the game. The role is extremely versatile and a wide range of techniques and experiences are required. Due to the versatile and cross-disciplinary nature, they need to work extremely close with other crafts and have great communication and collaboration skills.
   

  

 At Embark we are constantly evolving our tools and workflows with the ambition of eliminating tedious and manual input. This in turn means the role of an Environment Artist constantly changes, with the Artist having to adapt to new tools, workflows, and mindset, as many traditional tasks move towards proceduralism and automation. As an Environment Artist at Embark we value multiple years of previous experience within game development, with a deep understanding of modelling, texturing, shaders, lighting and photogrammetry. Knowledge and interest within traditional arts, architecture, color theory, geography, geology, and other relevant fields is also highly valued.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Props placement, terrain sculpting, and creation of natural biome content
* 3D modelling, texturing and shader work
* Create mood board and collect reference material to reach the direction presented by directors
* Work with photogrammetry and attend photogrammetry reference trips
* Play the game, participate in playtests and provide feedback
* Create plans for content production and workflows
* Work with and review content from relevant external partners


**We would love if you have**
* Excellent visual skillset and deep artistic understanding and knowledge
* Minimum 5-7 years of relevant professional experience within the game industry
* A portfolio that showcases realistic game art
* Experience building vegetation is a plus
* Great understanding of the technical aspects of the game, memory and performance
* Follow directions and deliver to quality from a visual, gameplay and technical perspective
* Great communication and collaboration skills
* Great understanding of the the gameplay experience of the game
* Ability to deliver according to agreed time and budget constraints
* Estimate tasks and time, update plans, and deliver content to quality according to directions
* Be a role model, culture carrier and spokesperson for Embark


*This is an on-site role, and we are only considering candidates already residing in Sweden.*
 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Product Manager Consumer
description:
Country: Sweden
   

  

 Shape the Future of Consumer Lending
   

  

 What drives customers to choose one lender over another? How can we continuously improve the customer journey while delivering sustainable growth and profitability?
   

  

 As Product Manager for Consumer Loans, you will play a key role in shaping the future of Santander's consumer lending business in Sweden. You will be responsible for the product strategy, roadmap, and commercial performance of the Consumer Loans portfolio across the full customer lifecycle—from application through to the end of the customer relationship.
   

  

 Working closely with colleagues across the Nordic organization, you will identify market opportunities, optimize customer value propositions, and ensure our products remain competitive, compliant, and customer-focused.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Define and execute the product strategy, vision, and roadmap for the Consumer Loans portfolio in Sweden.
* Manage product profitability and key commercial performance indicators, ensuring sustainable growth and strong business results.
* Monitor customer, competitor, technology, and regulatory developments, translating insights into product enhancements and business opportunities.
* Lead cross-functional collaboration across Business Development, Pricing, Marketing, Risk, Operations, IT, and other stakeholders to optimize product performance.
* Own and prioritize the product backlog, driving product development, simplification, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Support the development of pricing strategies, distribution channels, insurance offerings, and customer acquisition initiatives to strengthen Santander's market position.


**About You**
 You are a commercially minded and customer-focused professional who combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution. You thrive in collaborative environments, build strong relationships across functions, and use data and market insights to drive informed decisions.
   

  

**Experience**
* At least 3 years of experience in a senior commercial role, preferably within product management, business development, strategy, sales, or commercial planning.
* Experience within consumer lending, banking, financial services, or a related industry.
* Strong understanding of consumer loan products, portfolio management, pricing, and profitability drivers.
* Experience working in cross-functional and agile environments.
* Good knowledge of the Nordic consumer lending market, customer behaviors, and competitive landscape.


 Education
   

  

* Master's degree in Finance, Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
* Significant relevant professional experience may be considered an equivalent qualification.


 Skills & Competencies
   

  

* Strong commercial and analytical capabilities with the ability to translate insights into action.
* Experience managing product performance, profitability, and business KPIs.
* Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and presentation skills.
* Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint.
* Understanding of product development methodologies and agile ways of working.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.


 Personal Qualities
   

  

* Curious, proactive, and solution-oriented.
* Structured and organized, with strong prioritization skills.
* Results-driven, with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.
* Collaborative team player who builds trust and strong relationships.
* Customer-focused, with the ability to balance customer needs and business objectives.


**We offer:**
* An opportunity to work in a large, high-performing international company, in a dynamic environment that is constantly changing
* A corporate culture that is professional, yet informal, customer and value driven
* Highly competent and dedicated co-workers with strong collaboration across the Nordics
* A high level of diversity and multi-cultural working atmosphere
* A strong focus on learning and development


 Interested in this opportunity?
   

  

 We encourage you to apply as soon as possible and not later than 2nd of August. If you have any questions about the role, feel free to contact the Hiring Leader, Christian.Tubaas@gruposantander.com.
   

  

*Background checks are conducted for relevant candidates as part of the recruitment process. For positions that require authorization and/or confirmation of suitability, a police certificate of good conduct and credit check must be presented. Background check is carried out with prior consent from the candidate.*

title: Solution Architect
description:
**About Applied Intuition**
 Applied Intuition, Inc. is powering the future of physical AI. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion, the Silicon Valley company is creating the digital infrastructure needed to bring intelligence to every moving machine on the planet. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining and agriculture industries in three core areas: tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy. Eighteen of the top 20 global automakers, as well as the United States military and its allies, trust the company’s solutions to deliver physical intelligence. Applied Intuition is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, with offices in Washington, D.C.; San Diego; Ft. Walton Beach, Florida; Ann Arbor, Michigan; London; Stuttgart; Munich; Stockholm; Bangalore; Seoul; and Tokyo. Learn more at applied.co.
   

  

*We are an in-office company, and our expectation is that employees primarily work from their Applied Intuition office 5 days a week. However, we also recognize the importance of flexibility and trust our employees to manage their schedules responsibly. This may include occasional remote work, starting the day with morning meetings from home before heading to the office, or leaving earlier when needed to accommodate family commitments.*
 Meet our Solution Architects!
   

  

 Our Solution Architects (SA) act as the glue between our customers and our engineering teams. They are responsible for customer success and drive impact with high-priority customer engagements – hear from them on what life is like at Applied Intuition and what makes their roles so exciting!
   

  

**About The Role**
 (We are hiring for all levels of experience.)
   

  

 We are looking for bright software engineers interested in extending and adapting our products for Applied Intuition's global customers. Our Solution Architects have a unique mix of software expertise, domain knowledge, and an execution-driven mindset. Using these skills, our engineers work closely with autonomy developers to ensure that Applied Intuition's products are providing maximum impact to advance customers autonomy initiatives. This is an important role for the company, bringing together our product and engineering expertise with our customer-centric culture.
   

  

 Check out what a typical day would look like as a Solution Architect here!
   

  

**At Applied Intuition, You Will**
* Work closely with customers to understand their development needs and use cases for autonomy to propose effective use of Applied Intuition's products
* Collaborate with engineering teams to ensure the product roadmap enables current and prospective customers
* Ensure customer needs are supported by the broader engineering team through effective prioritization
* Collaborate with our sales team to gather requirements through detailed technical discussions and workshops
* Explore new product development areas driven by strategic understanding of the customer landscape


**We're Looking For Someone Who Has**
* Experience with interacting with end-customers as an application engineer or a developer
* Familiarity with best practices in large scale software development
* Strong communication skills and focus on solving customer problems


**Nice To Have**
* Prior background in technical sales or application engineering for simulation products
* Experience with automotive OEMs or suppliers
* Prior work in autonomous vehicle development domains
* Prior work in software simulation


*Don’t meet every single requirement? If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.*
*Applied Intuition is an equal opportunity employer and federal contractor or subcontractor. Consequently, the parties agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of 41 CFR 60-1.4(a), 41 CFR 60-300.5(a) and 41 CFR 60-741.5(a) and that these laws are incorporated herein by reference. These regulations prohibit discrimination against qualified individuals based on their status as protected veterans or individuals with disabilities, and prohibit discrimination against all individuals based on their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or national origin. These regulations require that covered prime contractors and subcontractors take affirmative action to employ and advance in employment individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status or disability. The parties also agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of Executive Order 13496 (29 CFR Part 471, Appendix A to Subpart A), relating to the notice of employee rights under federal labor laws.*
