* Clear communication that brings people along, with strategy and tradeoffs open enough for others to challenge.
* Comfort working before the process exists. You bring structure without slowing the company down.
* Fluency using AI in your own work, from research and synthesis to prototyping and analysis. We will ask for concrete examples of how you already do this.



  





**Bonus If You Have Experience With** 



* Building AI into a product itself, not just using it: judgment on where it should automate, where a human should stay in the loop, and whether the output is good enough to ship.
* Ad tech, martech, creative tools, media, or another commercially complex domain.
* Moving a company from service-heavy delivery to scalable product revenue.
* Building or shaping a product function early.
* Self-serve, usage-based, hybrid, or enterprise pricing.



  





**Application** 




 As we review applications and interview on a continuous basis, please apply as soon as possible.
 



 Due to the high volume of applications received, we are unable to provide personalized feedback prior to the interview stage. Thank you for understanding!
 



 We conduct background checks on all SeenThis-hires to comply with our customers and protect business-critical information.
 



  





 We look forward to welcoming you to SeenThis!

title: Key Account Manager
description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.
   

  

 The Senior Key Account Manager – Public Sector, Healthcare & Education is responsible for driving sustainable revenue growth through strategic account management, public procurement excellence, and channel partner engagement across the Nordic region.
   

  

 This role combines commercial leadership with strong analytical capabilities, focusing on identifying, managing, and winning complex public tenders while building long-term relationships with customers, procurement stakeholders, channel partners, and internal teams.
   

  

 The position requires deep expertise in public sector procurement processes, tender management, business analytics, and indirect sales models. Success in this role is achieved through a data-driven approach, strategic planning, and the ability to navigate complex multi-stakeholder sales cycles.
   

  

 Your Contribution
   

  

* Lead and manage the full tender lifecycle, including opportunity identification, qualification, bid strategy, response coordination, submission, and post-award follow-up.
* Develop and execute growth strategies across Public Sector, Healthcare, and Education verticals.
* Drive business growth through a combination of direct sales activities and channel partner engagement.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with procurement authorities, decision-makers, consultants, and strategic customers.
* Collaborate closely with channel partners, distributors, and system integrators to identify opportunities and maximize market coverage.
* Analyze procurement pipelines, framework agreements, market trends, and competitive landscapes to identify new business opportunities.
* Monitor public procurement platforms and proactively manage tender opportunities across the Nordic region.
* Conduct detailed bid/no-bid assessments based on commercial, technical, and strategic criteria.
* Coordinate cross-functional teams including sales, legal, finance, product management, and operations to deliver high-quality tender responses.
* Develop account plans for strategic customers and framework agreements to maximize long-term revenue potential.
* Maintain accurate pipeline management, forecasting, and opportunity tracking within CRM systems.
* Deliver regular business reviews, market insights, and performance reporting to senior management.
* Ensure compliance with procurement regulations, contractual obligations, and company governance requirements.
* Represent the company at industry events, procurement forums, and customer engagements.


**Qualifications And SkillsExperience**
* Proven track record managing complex public sector sales and tender processes.
* Strong experience working with public procurement, framework agreements, and regulated purchasing environments.
* Demonstrated success in Healthcare, Education, or Public Sector markets.
* Experience working with channel partners, distributors, and indirect sales models.
* Experience managing strategic accounts and long sales cycles involving multiple stakeholders.
* Nordic market experience is considered highly advantageous.


 Competencies
   

  

* Exceptional analytical and commercial acumen with the ability to interpret complex procurement requirements and market data.
* Strong tender management and bid strategy capabilities.
* Advanced stakeholder management and relationship-building skills.
* Excellent negotiation and contract management skills.
* Strategic thinking combined with strong execution capabilities.
* Ability to assess market opportunities and develop data-driven growth strategies.
* Strong project management and cross-functional coordination skills.
* Advanced CRM, forecasting, and pipeline management capabilities.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced and competitive environment.


 Key Strengths
   

  

* Tender & Bid Management
* Public Procurement Expertise
* Strategic Account Management
* Channel & Partner Development
* Business Analytics & Market Intelligence
* Commercial Negotiation
* Forecasting & Pipeline Management
* Stakeholder Management
* Strategic Planning
* Cross-Functional Leadership


 Across Logitech we empower collaboration and foster play. We help teams collaborate/learn from anywhere, without compromising on productivity or continuity so it should be no surprise that most of our jobs are open to work from home from most locations. Our hybrid work model allows some employees to work remotely while others work on-premises. Within this structure, you may have teams or departments split between working remotely and working in-house.
   

  

 Logitech is an amazing place to work because it is full of authentic people who are inclusive by nature as well as by design. Being a global company, we value our diversity and celebrate all our differences. Don’t meet every single requirement? Not a problem. If you feel you are the right candidate for the opportunity, we strongly recommend that you apply. We want to meet you!
   

  

 We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits packages and working environments that are designed to be flexible and help you to care for yourself and your loved ones, now and in the future. We believe that good health means more than getting medical care when you need it. Logitech supports a culture that encourages individuals to achieve good physical, financial, emotional, intellectual and social wellbeing so we all can create, achieve and enjoy more and support our families. We can’t wait to tell you more about them being that there are too many to list here and they vary based on location.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, sex, age, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or on the basis of disability.
   

  

 If you require an accommodation to complete any part of the application process, are limited in the ability, are unable to access or use this online application process and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact us toll free at +1-510-713-4866 for assistance and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

title: Staff Software Engineer – AI & Automation
description:
**Join our global force of 400+ innovators, blending the latest in tech with the greatest in soundtracking, from our Stockholm HQ to offices in London, New York, Los Angeles, Berlin, Paris, Oslo, and Seoul. We’re an industry leader with a startup mentality. We take what we do seriously, but we don’t take ourselves too seriously. Creating and collaborating to transform the sound of streaming, content, and culture. Come join us, and let the world** 
***feel***
**your work.**
 We're Looking For a
 **Staff Software Engineer – AI & Automation**
 We're building a new Productivity Engineering team, and you'll be the founding engineer of an internal platform that lets non-engineers build, deploy, and host agents and applications. This means your decisions will shape the architecture, the developer experience, and the culture of the team for years to come.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
 Operating with an AI-first mindset, you will leverage AI, agents and technical logic to:
   

  

* Architect and build the foundational platform that enables business users across the organisation to create, deploy, and manage internal applications and agents without requiring engineering support.
* Own the end-to-end design of this platform, from infrastructure and hosting to the self-service interfaces and guardrails that make it safe and approachable for non-technical users.
* Establish the patterns, integrations, and building blocks that connect to core enterprise systems and allow business teams to move quickly without compromising security or compliance.
* Work closely with business stakeholders to translate operational needs into platform capabilities, ensuring the systems you build are not only technically sound but genuinely adopted.
* Operate as a senior technical voice within a small, high-autonomy team, helping set architectural direction and raising the bar for how the team designs and delivers.


**Requirements & Technical Competence**
* The Blueprint: Extensive track record as a Senior, Staff, or Principal Engineer, with a proven history of owning greenfield platforms, distributed systems, and backend scalability patterns.
* Infrastructure & Platform: Deep production-scale GCP (compute, networking, IAM, managed services), Kubernetes, and Helm (designing for multi-tenancy).
* Languages: Proficient in Go (primary), with comfort across the stack in TypeScript and/or Python.
* Developer Experience (DX): Hands-on experience with GitOps, environment provisioning, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), and enterprise security/IAM (SSO/Okta integration).
* AI Integration: Experience integrating LLMs and agentic systems into production backends (Vertex AI, Gemini, OpenAI, MCP, or similar).
* Product Mindset: Strong understanding of API design and a proven ability to design for non-technical users—you care about onboarding, UX, documentation, and what "easy to use" means in practice.


**Way of Working:** 
 Highly autonomous, comfortable with high ambiguity, and able to clearly present technical trade-offs to non-engineering stakeholders.
   

  

**Equal opportunity employer**
 We believe that bringing people together from different backgrounds, experiences and perspectives makes for a healthy workplace, a more successful business and a better world. We value diversity and encourage everyone to come and soundtrack the world with us.
   

  

**Application**
 Ready to make the world
 *feel* 
 your work? Please apply, in English.

title: Business-minded Software Developer
description:
What we do
   

  

 We are Columbia Road, a Nordic digital sales consultancy dedicated to transforming how companies grow. Our mission is to help companies sell better in the digital era. We focus on measurable results – not just building IT systems – using a mix of software development and design, modern data platforms, and AI-enabled marketing and sales.
   

  

 Our clients include ambitious B2B and B2C companies - from global consumer brands to leading industrial players. Together, we orchestrate personalised customer journeys, automate at scale, and deliver measurable commercial impact.
   

  

 Who we are
   

  

 We’re a community-led company, built on trust, transparency, and a low hierarchy. Instead of line managers and red tape, we offer Roadies the tools and resources to make the best possible decisions for their own work and our community. At Columbia Road, you have the freedom to grow, challenge, and cultivate an entrepreneurial spirit as part of a small ambitious team in Sweden and a wider Nordic network. Diversity, equity, and inclusion are at the heart of who we are and we are committed to making you feel welcome from day one. We’re proud of our 4.6/5 rating on Glassdoor and are always looking to do even better.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As a Software Development Consultant, you’ll join our cross-functional group of professionals working on everything from web apps to backend services – helping our clients grow their digital sales. You’ll work with technologies like JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, Go, Apex and more. Many of our projects also involve CRM systems, marketing automation, websites & ecommerce. You don’t necessarily know everything yet, but you have some experience, and you’re ready to expand your skillset quickly to match the task at hand.
   

  

 You will be supported in your learning by peers in both development and other domains, and you’ll have the ability to create real impact in our clients’ businesses. Your motivation comes from the results and impact your solution creates, rather than the technical beauty of the code. For us, technology is a tool to create business impact for our clients, and we are agnostic in choosing whichever tools best solve the challenge.
   

  

 To Give You An Idea Of What Your Work Could Look Like, Here Are Some Digital Sales Projects Ranging From Ecommerce Sites To CRM Development
   

  

* We help SAS streamline customer service with Salesforce.
* We’re working with Moomin on a scalable, multi-market ecommerce platform.


 Your daily work will include hands-on software development work in close collaboration with client team members as well as fellow Roadies. You’ll also get to develop our own community by sharing your learnings, planning events and taking part in establishing Columbia Road in the Swedish market.
   

  

 If you're looking for a workplace where you’re given real responsibility from day one and where you get to learn new things fast from more experienced peers, you'll find it here.
   

  

**Here’s how you know you’ll be a good fit:**
* You have 2-3 years of professional experience in full-stack software development
* You’re agnostic in your tech-approach and are open to using a wide array of languages, frameworks, CRM and CMS systems and ecommerce platforms, selecting the tools that best match our clients’ needs.
* In addition to Typescript/Javascript frontend frameworks, you’re comfortable with backend programming and integrations, and can work in other languages as well (e.g. Python, Go, PHP, Ruby, etc.)
* You’re familiar with testing web and backend applications, from UI/component tests (e.g., Jest, React Testing Library) to integration tests and APIs.
* Some experience with CI/CD, containerization (Docker), Git and cloud platforms such as Google Cloud, Azure, AWS.
* Continuous improvement and agile ways of working are familiar to you
* You’re business minded, meaning you love the problem and not the solution.
* You’re no stranger to working with people from areas outside of the technical and you are comfortable communicating matters related to your own work – it’s not a problem for you to present your own ideas to a small group of people from time to time, for example in a workshop.
* You are self-driven, proactive and want to continuously learn new things.
* You would love to work with challenging client cases supported by a diverse community of digital sales professionals.
* You have a “get things done” attitude towards your work.
* You have professional proficiency in both Swedish and English


 We value close and constant collaboration in our team work – whether it’s with customers, fellow Roadies and/or consultants from other companies – as it enables us to learn from each other and work more efficiently towards a shared goal. Often this is achieved best by working from the same location. Hence, we can only consider candidates who live (or plan to move) within commuting distance of central Stockholm and are open to working on-site according to client needs.
   

  

*Note: We are currently not able to offer visa sponsorships for Sweden, so, unfortunately, we can't consider applications from outside EU/EEA.*
 Recruitment process
   

  

 We are looking for a new colleague to join us as soon as possible and will move swiftly with the recruitment process.
   

  

 The recruitment process usually has 1-3 steps during which we get to know who you are and what motivates you. You will learn more about Columbia Road and get to meet different people from our company. You'll have the opportunity to present highlights from your career and tell us about your skills, roles, and learnings. When we’re done with the face-to-face discussions, we’ll contact the people you have chosen as references.
   

  

**Deadline to apply:** 
 August 21st, 2026
   

  

 Please note that we will interview candidates already during the application period and fill the position as soon as we find the right match. We look forward to hearing from you as soon as possible!
   

  

**Start Date:** 
 Flexible, during fall 2026.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A community-led organisation with a high level of autonomy
* A diverse, equitable, and inclusive workplace
* Option to buy stocks of the company through the common employee share program
* Recurring training and learning sessions to support your professional growth
* Office in central Stockholm with snacks and refreshments
* A wide selection of quality tools to use for your work (laptop, phone etc.) and a mobile phone subscription
* Health insurance incl. mental health, pension, and other insurances
* 5000 SEK tax-free wellness benefit (Friskvårdsbidrag)
* Recurring Roadie-ideated events and activities
* Compensation for working on open source or social programs in your free time


 We help companies sell better by building seamless digital solutions and running concrete growth activities. Find your Road with us by exploring open jobs or Connecting with us!

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
EQT is looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to join our engineering platform team in Stockholm. This is a hands-on role for an experienced engineer who enjoys building reliable platforms, working closely with teams, and driving long-term impact.
   

  

**About The Engineering Platform Team**
 The engineering platform team builds and operates EQT’s core platform, enabling product teams to run secure, reliable, and scalable services, data-products and agentic ai. The team works closely with developers and security partners, with a strong focus on automation, standards, and operational excellence.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will work across EQT’s engineering platform and lead the design and delivery of key platform initiatives. You will collaborate with teams across the organization to drive adoption, improve reliability, and enhance the developer experience.
   

  

* Lead the design, architecture, and rollout of platform projects from start to finish.
* Collaborate with engineers across the organization to align on platform standards and best practices.
* Operate and continuously improve the engineering platform.
* Contribute to on-call rotations and support platform reliability.
* Improve platform reliability, security, and developer experience.
* Support incident response, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis.


**About You**
 You enjoy working in a high-trust environment and take ownership of building strong technical foundations. You are collaborative, structured in your approach, and motivated by enabling others to succeed.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience as a senior Platform, SRE, or Infrastructure Engineer.
* Proven experience leading platform projects from concept through to production.
* Hands-on experience running Kubernetes production environments.
* Experience working with cloud platforms, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Experience with infrastructure as code, preferably Terraform.
* Familiarity with GitOps and CI/CD workflows.


 Tech Stack / Environment: GCP, GKE, ArgoCD, Gatekeeper, Cilium, Terraform, CircleCI, GitHub, Cloudflare, Datadog, incident.io, Snowflake, DBT, Hex, Go, Python, Next.js
   

  

**Nice to have:**
* Experience with platform security.
* Knowledge of authentication and identity systems.
* Strong networking knowledge across cloud and Kubernetes environments.
* Interest in the Agentic AI ecosystem
* Experience improving platform and production environment resilience.


**What We Offer**
 At EQT, you will work in a collaborative and high-trust environment where your ideas and contributions matter. You will have the opportunity to shape a modern engineering platform, work with experienced colleagues, and continue to grow your skills while delivering meaningful impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Senior Android Engineer
description:
**Join Truecaller – The place where innovation meets impact!** 




  





 Truecaller's mission is to build trust in communication by making it safer, smarter, and more efficient. Born in Sweden, trusted by the world, and here’s why we stand out:
 


* We are trusted by over 450 million active users every month across 190+ countries
* We identify over 15 billion calls daily, helping users avoid spam and scams
* We are powered by a team of 450+ employees from 45+ nationalities



  





 We always look for people who take initiative, own their work, and keep raising the bar. An entrepreneurial mindset matters here, especially when it turns bold ideas into real actions. We stay collaborative and focused, always searching for smarter paths forward. If you want to make an impact and grow with a team that inspires millions, you’ll fit right in.
 



  





**The role:** 




 As a Senior Software Engineer, Android, you will be responsible for enabling and performing highly efficient application development, improving the Truecaller services for the Android platform. You will be deeply involved in the whole cycle of product development, from idea generation to delivery.
 



  





**What you will do** 



* Write code with great code standards
* Deliver complex features on both front-end intensive tasks and performance improvements on the existing code base
* Cover the code implementations with tests and improve the code coverage
* Participate in code reviews and technical design discussions
* Bring engineering experience to advise product and business teams to make better decisions
* Mentor the junior developers and take ownership of maintaining high engineering standards and a growth mindset in the team.
* Be the point of contact and liaise with the release team on the continuous delivery of high-quality code and the timely resolution of bugs



  





**What you bring in** 



* 5+ years of experience in Android development
* Strong knowledge of the Android SDK (minimum 5+ years of experience)
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs
* Sound knowledge of Kotlin and Java programming languages
* Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git
* Experience with SQL databases
* Excellent debugging skills
* Fluent in English, in speaking and writing
* Experience in working with Agile methodologies



  





**It would be great if you also have** 



* Familiarity with other mobile operating systems, like iOS
* Firebase tools such as remote config
* AB testing, Crashlytics, and user acquisition tools such as Appsflyer
* CRM tools such as Clevertap



  





**What we offer:** 




 We support growth through learning resources, leadership programs, mentoring, and real hands-on work. People can move between teams and projects to build new skills and keep things interesting. We offer clear internal mobility and a transparent path for progression, with leaders who stay involved and provide guidance throughout the year. In addition, you will benefit from:
 







* **A comprehensive compensation package:** 
 We offer a competitive salary, 30 days of paid vacation, private health insurance, parental leave top-up, pension, and wellness contributions.
* **Modern tools to do your best work:** 
 Choose your preferred computer and phone within our budget, so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
* **A people-focused office culture:** 
 We value in-person collaboration and follow an office-first model, with some flexibility. Our offices offer a vibrant environment with opportunities to learn, connect, and recharge, from breakfast, lunch, and well-stocked snack stations and quiet spaces to team activities such as movie nights, tech meetups, and cultural events. There's something for everyone.
* **Truecaller’s “Lab Days”** 
 offer a space for imagination: 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they’ve always wanted to. It’s a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.



  





**Come as you are:** 




 Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. No matter where you're from, what language you speak, or how you identify, we value what makes you unique and would love to get to know you.
 



  





 Check out
 **Life at Truecaller -** 
 Behind the code:
 **https://www.instagram.com/lifeattruecaller/** 




  





**Sounds like a great opportunity?** 




  





 We will fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate, so please send your application as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, we will conduct a background check.
 



  





**We only accept applications in English.**

title: AI Enablement Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

 The role
   

  

 AI is reshaping how legal work gets done, and at Legora we're not just watching that happen — we're building it from the inside.
   

  

 Our AI Enablement function exists to make sure every team at Legora can build, use, and govern AI well. The function is young, the mandate is broad, and right now it's one person. You'd be joining to own a significant slice of that work — managing engineers, translating business needs into action, and becoming the go-to for anything AI across the organization.
   

  

 This is a high-ownership generalist seat for someone energized by ambiguity who would rather figure it out and ship than wait for a perfect brief.
   

  

 What You’ll Be Doing
   

  

 We operate across three streams — you'll own initiatives in all of them, from rough idea to shipped result:
   

  

**Build**
* Coordinate agent and internal tool builds with engineers, keeping projects moving and translating between business needs and technical direction.


**Enable**
* Run training, workshops, and documentation that help teams adopt AI.
* Build and grow an AI champions program across the org.
* Be the day-to-day support that makes enablement actually land.


**Govern**
* Draft and operationalize guidelines, access policies, and usage guardrails.
* Put the standards in place that let us move fast safely.


 Across all three, you'll act as a connector — building the relationships and touchpoints that make the function visible and trusted.
   

  

 Who You Are
   

  

* Technical foundation: engineering degree (or equivalent), enough coding exposure to hold your own with engineers.
* A few years in a fast-moving environment — ops, strategy, product, consulting, program management, or similar. Shape matters more than title.
* Genuinely AI-native, or clearly on the way: you reach for AI tools by default and want to go deeper.
* True generalist: comfortable switching between strategy, delivery, and people work in the same day.
* Exceptional learning speed — you get to depth on unfamiliar things fast and take feedback in quickly.
* Strong communicator with a low-ego, collaborative style.


 Nice to have
   

  

* Exposure to legal, GTM, or a regulated / high-trust environment.
* Experience with agent platforms, workflow tools, or no/low-code AI.
* A track record of starting something from scratch.


 What Success Looks Like (the first 6 months)
   

  

* You’re independently owning initiatives end-to-end across all three streams.
* You've taken real ground on at least one initiative in each stream.
* You’re a go to person for questions on AI Enablement at Legora.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Legal Advisor
description:
**Hiring: Legal Advisor Sourcing**
 We’re looking for a Legal Advisor Sourcing to join us at Telia.
   

  

 I’m
 **Jens Zetterberg** 
 ,
 **Head of Sourcing Center of Excellence** 
 , and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us. If you are a curious individual, ready to leave a lasting mark at a place where your skills will thrive – this is an opportunity for you!
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
* Draft and review commercial agreements in line with business and legal requirements
* Negotiate contract terms and support sourcing initiatives in supplier discussions
* Advise sourcing managers on contract interpretation, risk allocation, and compliance matters


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
* Proven experience in commercial contracts within a multinational environment (5+ years)
* Strong knowledge of contract law and commercial risk management
* Ability to manage negotiations and communicate complex legal matters clearly
* Curiosity and willingness to learn and use legal tech to enhance ways of working
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity.
 **As a Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 , we drive long‑term progress through large‑scale, impactful projects in an inclusive environment.
   

  

 Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What we offer:**
 At Telia, we care about your well-being, growth, and sense of belonging:
   

  

* Additional health insurance and pension plans
* Workation: work from anywhere in the EU for up to 30 days per year
* Extra vacation days based on tenure (up to 5 additional days)
* Discounts on Telia services, including free home internet
* Partner offers and discounts (SPA, cafes, events)
* Telia Kids Club: summer camps for employees’ children
* Company-supported sports activities (yoga, basketball, running)
* Internal training, leadership programs and job shadowing to explore new roles


 …and more.
   

  

**For Lithuanian applicants only: monthly salary range for this position – 4000 – 5000 Eur (gross) + annual performance bonuses** 
 . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **July 3** 
****,** 
 2026** 
 . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to
 **Viive Näslund, Head of Legal Sourcing** 
 at
 **viive.naslund@teliacompany.com**
**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen – together!**

 www.telia.lt/karjera

title: Executive Advisor – Strategy & Execution, B2C Sverige
description:
*Vill du arbeta nära svensk B2C-ledning och vara med där prioriteringar sätts, beslut formas och viktiga initiativ drivs hela vägen till resultat?*
 B2C Sverige befinner sig i en viktig fas, där tydliga prioriteringar, stark struktur och hög genomförandekraft kommer att göra stor skillnad. Som Executive Advisor får du en central roll i detta arbete. Du blir en del av det svenska B2C Leadership Team, rapporterar direkt till EVP B2C och får en bred inblick i de frågor som formar riktning, tempo och affärsutveckling för B2C Sverige.
   

  

 Det här är en unik möjlighet för dig som har byggt en stark grund inom exempelvis management consulting, transformation, business analysis, PMO eller strategisk projektledning — och som nu vill komma närmare affären, ledningsarbetet och det faktiska genomförandet.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har**
* 3–6 års relevant erfarenhet från management consulting, transformation, business analysis, PMO, strategisk projektledning eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av att driva framdrift genom stakeholders, gärna i en miljö nära ledning eller seniora beslutsfattare
* Stark analytisk förmåga och vana att strukturera komplex information till tydliga planer, beslutsunderlag och uppföljning
* Högskoleexamen inom exempelvis IT, Data Science, ekonomi, finans, business, kommunikation, organisation eller annat relevant område
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Om rollen och teamet**
 I rollen kommer du att hålla ihop ledningsnära initiativ, skapa överblick i komplexa frågor och se till att beslut, ansvar och nästa steg blir tydliga. Du arbetar tvärfunktionellt med stakeholders i organisationen och bidrar till att viktiga prioriteringar får framdrift, ägarskap och effekt.
   

  

 Det är en sammanhållande och rådgivande roll med stor exponering mot svensk B2C-ledning. För rätt person innebär det en möjlighet att bygga kommersiellt djup, senior stakeholdervana och erfarenhet av att driva förändring nära besluten.
   

  

**Det här kommer du att arbeta med**
* Stötta svenska B2C Leadership Team i arbetet med prioriteringar, uppföljning och genomförande
* Agera strategiskt rådgivande stöd och PMO i viktiga initiativ för B2C Sverige
* Projektleda utvalda initiativ över team, funktioner och stakeholders
* Ta fram beslutsunderlag, ledningsmaterial, agendor och uppföljning
* Facilitera möten, workshops och forum som skapar samsyn och ägarskap
* Tydliggöra ansvar, nästa steg och deadlines i viktiga aktiviteter
* Bidra med analys, struktur och gott omdöme i strategiska, taktiska och operativa frågor


**Vem vi söker**
 Vi söker dig som vill ta nästa steg från analys, projektledning, konsulting eller transformation till en roll närmare affären och ledningsarbetet. Du vill inte bara ta fram underlag eller rekommendationer — du vill vara med och se till att saker faktiskt händer.
   

  

 Du kombinerar analytisk skärpa med stark stakeholder management. Du trivs i miljöer där du behöver skapa tydlighet, få med dig människor och påverka utan formellt mandat. Du är trygg i att arbeta nära senior ledning och har gott omdöme, hög integritet och förmåga att driva frågor framåt med både energi och fingertoppskänsla.
   

  

 För rätt person är detta en roll som ger bred affärsförståelse, senior stakeholdervana och erfarenhet av att driva förändring nära besluten.
   

  

**Rekryteringsprocessen**
* Talent Acquisition Screen
* Intervju med Hiring Manager
* Personlighets- och problemlösningstester med återkoppling och dialog med Talent Acquisition
* Caseintervju med Hiring Manager och peer/stakeholder
* Slutavstämning
* Referenser (full bakgrundkontroll kommer utföras på denna tjänst)


**Praktisk information**
 Placering: Stockholm, hybrid, med minst 3 dagar per vecka på kontoret i Haga staden.
   

  

 GlobalConnect erbjuder tyvärr inte relocation eller visumsponsring för den här rollen. Du behöver därför vara bosatt i Stockholm för att vara aktuell.
   

  

 Du behöver inte skicka ett personligt brev — skicka bara ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil.
   

  

 Bli en del av transformationen i ett av de mest spännande bolagen inom kritisk digital infrastruktur i norra Europa. Ansök idag.
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Guidewire Engineer
description:
Do you have a passion for simplifying the technical landscape, want to help us reshape the Mobility Insurance Industry, and understand the benefits of standard system implementations? We are now looking to expand our team with 3 additional Guidewire Engineers, join us!
   

  

**About The Team**
 As we continue modernizing our IT platforms, we are utilizing the power of standard customizable systems to support our core insurance business. This initiative is seen as a key success factor for If in the future to meet our business requirements and support our cooperation with the Mobility industry.
   

  

 We are in the delivering a new cloud-based core insurance system Guidewire InsuranceSuite for our partner offerings, need to mobilize the IT organization to make this transformation possible.
   

  

 We are an agile, innovative, and high-performing team dedicated to delivering high-quality software solutions in an iterative environment, and we look forward to having you on board.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Guidewire Engineer, you will have a key role in our dedicated IT unit, and are together with your team responsible for the implementation of our new cloud-based core insurance system. You will design, develop and deploy robust solutions using effective and modern engineering and agile practices, and continuously evolve them over time. It is important that you can navigate easily between various parts of the system and discuss technical solutions with cross functional teams also outside of the Guidewire context.
   

  

 We take modern development practices very seriously and expect an agile mindset with automated processes and quality by design.
   

  

**We offer**
 In the same way that we place high demands on you as an employee, we also expect you to place high demands on us as an employer. Here are some of the benefits of working at If:
   

  

* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the largest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
* Lunch bonus
* High pension savings


**Who You Are**
 We are looking for a driven professional with a passion for technology. You are solution-oriented, proactive, and enjoy working in a team environment. Your analytical mindset, coupled with your ability to communicate complex technical matters in a clear and uncomplicated way, makes you stand out. The working language is English, but knowing Swedish is also appreciated.
   

  

**You also have**
* A software engineering degree.
* Specialist or Ace certification as a Guidewire Developer in Policy Center or Billing Center.
* Specialist or Ace certification in Guidewire InsuranceSuite Integration.
* At least 2 years of proven experience in Guidewire InsuranceSuite Cloud implementation projects.
* Proficiency in Java, JSON and REST with Java development experience.
* Solid experience and interest in test automation principles and methodologies.
* Good understanding of Agile methodologies and modern Software Development Life Cycle.
* Experience with DevOps principles and technologies, emphasizing Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD).
* Excellent communication skills in English (Swedish is a bonus).
* Experience of the Swedish motor insurance market is meriting.


**Our promise to you**
 You will be part of an international, modern, and dynamic working environment within the leading insurance company in the Nordic region. You will have challenging and exciting tasks driving your personal and skills development. Training opportunities within and outside the organization will support your career growth. You will be at the forefront of delivering solutions aimed at the changing mobility landscape.
   

  

**Additional Facts And The Recruitment Process**
**Application deadline** 
 : Screening and interviewing will start immediately, and recruitment will be done continuously.
   

**To apply for the position** 
 : Please attach your CV
   

**Work location** 
 : Sweden (Bergshamra) (Swedish citizen or permanent residence permit)
   

  

**Start:** 
 As soon as possible or by agreement
   

  

 For more information, please contact Peter Hartlén, Sourcing Manager, peter.hartlen@if.se.
   

  

 A background check will be conducted on all final candidates.
   

  

 Read more about our Tech Community at If and how we together create tech that matters: http://www.if.se/tech
   

  

 Ready to be part of our dynamic team and drive impactful change? Apply today and seize this opportunity!

title: Integrationsarkitekt
description:
*Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och bygga framtidens integrationslösningar? Accelerate växer och vi söker integrationsarkitekter som vill vara med och skapa smarta, hållbara och effektiva IT-lösningar för våra kunder.*
**Din roll**
 Som integrationsarkitekt hos Accelerate är du med och formar framtidens integrationslösningar. Du bygger robusta och moderna system som knyter samman applikationer och data på ett smart och hållbart sätt, både i molnet och on-prem.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära både verksamhet och IT, där du omsätter behov till genomtänkta lösningar och vägleder utvecklare genom hela processen. Rollen innebär att du bidrar med både strategiskt tänk och praktiskt genomförande , från koncept och design till implementering och förbättring.
   

  

 Hos Accelerate får du möjlighet att kombinera beprövade tjänster med skräddarsydda kundlösningar, arbeta tillsammans med erfarna kollegor och bidra till att forma framtidens digitala integrationsplattformar.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av att utveckla moderna lösningar inom Microsofts miljöer och som trivs i en roll där teknik möter affärsnytta. Du har arbetat i utvecklingsteam under flera år och är van vid att ta ansvar genom hela utvecklingsprocessen, från design till leverans.
   

  

 Du har goda kunskaper inom flera av följande områden:
   

  

* C#, .NET Core och .NET Framework
* RESTful services, Microservices, Azure Logic Apps, Azure Function Apps, App Services, Azure API Apps
* SQL Server, Azure SQL, Entity Framework, Azure Storage, Azure Data Factory
* Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, Azure API Management, Azure Active Directory
* Microsoft Visual Studio/Visual Studio Code, Post man, Git, Azure DevOps, Gitflow, SoapUI
* PowerShell, Bash


 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift. För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Som anställd på Accelerate erbjuder vi förutom spännande uppdrag och tekniker:
   

  

* Utbildning & certifieringar via våra partners (Microsoft, Red Hat, HashiCorp, GitLab m.fl.)
* En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner
* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjukvårdsförsäkring
* Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
* Att bli del i ett passionerat team med tekniskt vassa kollegor


 Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
   

  

**Placeringsort**
 Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
   

  

 Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
   

  

**Välkommen till Accelerate!**

title: Growth Tech lead
description:
Nofence is a Norwegian scale up who has built the world’s first virtual fencing solution for livestock. As we aim to revolutionize livestock management we will need top-notch competence in our Growth team, and we are now looking for a Growth Tech Lead. Elevate your career with us and be at the forefront of innovation in agricultural technology!
   

  

**About The Role**
 We're looking for a Tech Lead who is a full-stack engineer with a strong frontend instinct to join our Growth team. This is a high-ownership role where you'll set technical direction, ship meaningful products, and help the growth developers do their best work. This role requires high business acumen and understanding of our customers. You will be the sparring partner for the VP of Growth and the Growth manager.
   

  

 This is a hybrid role where you will be expected to write and review code while also setting the technical direction of this team and will be responsible for delivery, being the technical voice in cross-functional discussions.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
**Technical direction**
* Own the frontend architecture of growth surfaces - component structure, performance, and the quality of what users actually see and interact with
* Own the experimentation infrastructure - feature flags, A/B test assignment, event instrumentation, and result integrity
* Make build/buy/integrate decisions on growth tooling (analytics, CRM integrations, marketing platforms)
* Balance delivery speed with technical debt and trade-offs


**Delivery & execution**
* Own the engineering delivery rhythm - planning, scoping, and making sure the team ships reliably
* Break down complex growth initiatives into well-scoped, executable work
* Unblock your team of developers through pairing, code review, and hands-on problem solving
* Balance the speed demands of growth work with engineering practices that don't create a mess to clean up later


**Experimentation & data**
* Be the technical counterpart to the Growth Manager on A/B testing - help them define the hypothesis and audience to make sure the test is instrumented correctly and the data is trustworthy
* Collaborate with analytics to validate experiment results
* Own integrations with CRM, email automation, and ad platforms from the engineering side - data piping, APIs, attribution tracking


**Cross-functional collaboration**
* Partner with the VP of Growth on roadmap trade-offs and technical feasibility
* Work closely with UX on implementation of growth experiences - flagging constraints early, not at handoff
* Represent engineering clearly and confidently in team discussions - translating technical complexity into language that drives good decisions


**About You**
 The right candidate is preferred to have the following qualifications:
   

  

* Preferably experience with e-commerce and scaleups
* Proven experience as a senior fullstack engineer or tech lead with a preference towards frontend
* Strong product sense - you think about user behaviour and business outcomes, not just technical correctness
* Experience with A/B testing infrastructure and experiment instrumentation
* Comfortable with ambiguity - growth work is iterative and hypothesis-driven, not always neatly defined
* Strong communicator who can work fluidly with non-technical teammates
* Experience with CRM, marketing automation, or ad platform integrations is a plus


**About Nofence**
 Managing livestock has always been a challenge. Humanity has tried everything from herding with dogs to walling the animals in with barbed wire, electric, and wooden fences, but these are costly and time-consuming solutions and often in conflict with the local wildlife. It has also left vast areas of potential pasture overgrown and underutilized.
   

  

 Until now.
   

  

 Enter virtual fences.
   

  

 What started as a small group of farmers and engineers with a big idea has become Nofence – the world’s first virtual fencing solution for livestock. Curious about how it works? Find out more here.
   

  

**About The Application**
 Are you ready to change pasture? Just like the soil needs a balanced diversity of nutrients to thrive, a company needs a diversity of hearts and minds. We are an equal opportunity employer!
   

  

 We will evaluate candidates continuously. If you have any questions about Nofence or regarding the application, please reach out to Håkan Skyttmo at skyttmo@nofence.com
   

  

 Nofence is proud to have built the world’s first virtual fence for livestock. Our product represents the beginning of a tremendous shift in farming towards a sustainable future for agriculture. Make an impact and join us in building technology that creates a positive difference for animals, farmers and the environment.
   

  

 Nofence is proud to have built the world’s first virtual fence for livestock. Our product represents the beginning of a tremendous shift in farming towards a sustainable future for agriculture. Make an impact and join us in building technology that creates a positive difference for animals, farmers and the environment.

title: Head of Digital Operating Model & Development Excellence
description:
*We are now looking for a strategic and execution-oriented leader to take on the role as the Head of Digital Operating Model & Development Excellence.*  



*At If, our digital operating model is how we turn strategy into execution – underpinning our digital journey and enabling us to deliver customer value at scale. It brings together business and technology in cross-functional teams, enabling us to respond faster to changing customer needs, accelerate innovation, and to continuously develop our products, offerings, services and customer experiences.*  



*Today, more than 1,500 professionals at If operate within this model across the Nordics and Baltics. As a result, the digital operating model is not simply a way of working - it is a key capability that shapes how we deliver business outcomes, leverage our scale, and maintain our competitive position in an increasingly digital insurance market.*  



**About the role**
------------------

As Head of Digital Operating Model & Development Excellence at If, you will be driving the evolution of one of the largest digital operating models in the Nordics & Baltics.  

  



You will lead a newly established function that brings together key enablers including Operational Development Managers, Ifs Agile Center of Excellence and DevOps Center of Excellence. The line responsibility consists of ~25 professionals, with a broad range of competences such as leaders, strategists, engineers and agile coaches. The role is placed within Tech Strategy & People Development unit, IT, and works closely with a broad range of stakeholders across all Business Areas and IT.  

  



Your focus will be to ensure that our digital operating model continuously evolves to meet customer needs, supports effective cross-functional collaboration, and enables strong end-to-end execution at scale.  

  



**Key responsibilities**
------------------------

* Lead, inspire and develop a high-performing team, the Digital Operating Model & Development Excellence function
* Lead the strategic development of If’s digital operating model, ensuring it continues to evolve in line with business priorities, customer needs, and technology opportunities. Define, prioritize and drive change, ranging from incremental improvements to significant initiatives
* Lead and support steering and governance processes to ensure strategic priorities are executed effectively and progress is tracked
* Engage and collaborate with key stakeholders across Business Areas, IT, and enabling functions
* Developing the agile ways of working and engineering excellence across tribes and squads

**Who you are**
---------------

You are a strong and inspiring leader with the ability to combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution. You thrive in complex environments and are motivated by driving change and creating real impact at a high pace. Your leadership is characterized by clarity, trust, and a strong ability to create alignment across the organization.  

  



**To succeed in this role, you bring:**
---------------------------------------

* A do-er mentality, together with proven experience in leading and driving change in complex environments, particularly within digital and agile transformations
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders across all levels - from executive top management to tribes & squads
* Strong business acumen, with the ability to connect operating model development to business outcomes
* Effective leadership experience, including building and developing high-performing teams
* Tech-savviness, understanding software/technology development and its role in enabling business outcomes and organizational development
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to influence and drive change without requiring formal authority
* A high level of drive and integrity, combined with a structured and analytical way of working

**In addition, we believe you have:**
-------------------------------------

* A relevant academic degree (e.g. Engineering, Business, Computer Science or equivalent)
* Experience from roles within strategy-, business development or engineering, with a strong track record in shaping and implementing strategies
* Several years of line leadership experience, preferably from leading leaders
* Bonus: Experience from industries such as: SaaS and/or Financial Services
* Bonus: Experience working within digital operating models, software engineering and/or enterprise agile ways of working

**Our promise to you**
----------------------

* A key role in shaping and evolving how we deliver digital development at scale
* The opportunity to lead a newly established function with significant impact across the organization
* Close collaboration and visibility across key stakeholders across Business Areas and IT
* A dynamic and international environment, together with a culture that supports development, collaboration, and continuous learning
* A competitive compensation and benefits package

**Additional facts and the recruitment process**
------------------------------------------------

**Application deadline:** September 1st. We will begin screening applications and scheduling interviews in late August. Please note that there may be a longer response time than usual during the summer holiday period.


**To apply for the position:** Please attach your CV. Instead of a personal letter we kindly ask you to answer the questionnaires.


**Work location:** One of our main offices in the Nordic’s. Please note that this position involves occasional travel across If locations


**Start:** As soon as possible or by agreement.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens molnlösningar? På Accelerate får du arbeta med moderna tekniker, kunniga kollegor och spännande uppdrag. Vi söker nu en erfaren Cloud Engineer som vill kombinera tekniskt djup med kundnära arbete och ta sig an komplexa tekniska utmaningar.
  
Om rollen Som Cloud Engineer hos Accelerate hjälper du våra kunder att bygga och vidareutveckla deras molnplattformar. Du designar säkra och automatiserade lösningar i Azure, AWS eller GCP och hjälper utvecklingsteam att leverera snabbare.
  
Du är delaktig genom hela resan, från arkitektur och implementation till vidareutveckling, optimering och automatisering. Eftersom uppdragen varierar mellan olika kunder och branscher får du kontinuerligt utvecklas, bredda din kompetens och arbeta med moderna tekniker i framkant.
  
Vem är du? Vi söker dig som har minst 5 års erfarenhet av cloud och modern infrastruktur. Du har byggt upp en bred teknisk förståelse och känner dig trygg i att ta ansvar för lösningar, fatta tekniska beslut och driva arbetet framåt.
  
Du trivs i konsultrollen och tycker om att samarbeta med både kunder och kollegor. Samtidigt är du nyfiken, engagerad och motiveras av att lära dig nya tekniker och hitta lösningar på komplexa problem. Du har också en god förståelse för hur teknik kan bidra till verksamhetens mål och skapa värde för kunden.
  
  

**Vi ser att du har erfarenhet av:**  

Azure, AWS eller GCP
  
  

Kubernetes och containerbaserade lösningar
  
  

CI/CD
  
  

Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep eller liknande)
  
  

Säkerhet och governance i molnmiljöer
  
  

**Meriterande om du har:**  

Certifieringar inom Azure, AWS, GCP eller Kubernetes
  
  

Erfarenhet av Landing Zones, Cloud Adoption Framework eller Well-Architected Framework
  
  

Erfarenhet av plattformsnära arbete och automatisering
  
  

Varför Accelerate? Vi erbjuder dig mer än ett uppdrag, vi erbjuder en plattform för att utvecklas inom Cloud och DevOps. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta med moderna molnmiljöer, Kubernetes och automatisering hos kunder som ligger långt fram i sin digitala transformation.
  
  

**Som konsult hos oss får du:**  

Utbildning & certifieringar via våra partners (Microsoft, Red Hat, HashiCorp, GitLab m.fl.)
  
  

Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
  
  

Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag samt sjuk- och hälsoförsäkring
  
  

En trygg anställning med konkurrenskraftiga villkor
  
  

Utmanande och varierande uppdrag med moderna tekniker och plattformar
  
  

Vi tror på kompetensutbyte, nyfikenhet och ständig utveckling. Här får du möjlighet att växa tillsammans med kollegor som brinner för teknik och innovation.
  
Placeringsort Accelerate finns på flera orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Norrköping med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
  
Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
  
Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig! Välkommen till Accelerate.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens molnlösningar? På Accelerate får du arbeta med moderna tekniker, kunniga kollegor och spännande uppdrag. Vi söker nu en erfaren Cloud Engineer som vill kombinera tekniskt djup med kundnära arbete och ta sig an komplexa tekniska utmaningar.
